boardgame: What Do You Meme?: 90 Day Fiancé Expansion Pack
description:
What Do You Meme? is a party card game for the social media generation. Each round, one player takes the role of judge and plays a photo card, after which everyone else plays a caption card to complete the meme. The judge decides the funniest pairing, and whoever played the winning caption card wins the round. Lather, rinse, and repeat.

No Passport Needed: This is the expansion pack that lets players meme the most iconic moments of their favorite reality TV show, 90 Day Fiancé.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Hero Realms: Dungeons – Kickstarter Promo Pack
description:
Includes and all the Kickstarter exclusive promo cards from the Hero Realms: Dungeons Kickstarter campaign.

These cards were all shrinkwrapped together and has its own bar code. It was packaged separately from the base game. Like the other Promo packs will it be available in future Wise Wizzard-Kickstarter and in limited amounts on conventions.

boardgame: Coragem: A Chave Contra o Medo
description:
The Beast has always lived in a safe and comfortable castle, but something sinister has happened and the tranquillity is over. Fears invaded his castle and broke his heart into several pieces.
Now, as he walks through the castle, the Beast feels a terrifying fear.
In this game you will learn about the Beast's fears, and you will have to have courage and determination to face them. She will need the help of great heroes to conquer her fears and regain peace in her heart.

Each round, players move through the castle, retrieving items and gaining courage so that when they find a dark room, home to one of the Beast's fears, players can face it.
This is done using the courage acquired and an item card, along with creating a story about how that hero could use the item to conquer the fear forever.
Through the game, children are encouraged to talk about their own fears and how to overcome them, in a playful and fun way.

—description from the publisher (translated)

In ぼくの構築, roughly translated as "My Construction", the players draft building cards and then play a bag-building game which enables them to build these cards from their hand, use the cards once built, expand their buildings, and buy additional cubes.

The person with the most points wins.
designers: Tsukii Yosuke (つきい　ようすけ)

boardgame: Godtear: Fenra, Wolf of the End Times & Chainless Curs
description:
Feasting on godtears has blessed Fenra with unnatural size, and rumours abound that her ascent to godhood could bring about the end times in a rain of flaming crystals.

No wolf is complete without her pack - Fenra’s piercing howls summon a snarling pack of Chainless Curs, the cunning gnolls who hunt down and surround any who escape her razor-sharp wrath.

Inside this box is everything you need to add the Maelstrom champion Fenra, Wolf of The End Times & Chainless Curs, to your Godtear warband. Use this expansion with any Godtear starter set.

—description from the publisher

Can you sound like a rainforest, perform glass blowing, sculpt a taco, or draw a motorcycle with your eyes closed?

Cranium 25th Anniversary Edition will have you sketching, acting, humming, sculpting, picture-puzzling, and word-unscrambling in a party game that features eight hundred new questions across eighteen diverse activities.

This new edition of Cranium includes "Cranium Clay" and dry-erase whiteboard to help you craft your original works of art.

Hello, detectives! Welcome to the world of Big Brain! In this hilarious place, imaginations run wild and acting weird is normal — but with all the giggle-worthy goings-on, there's a lot of mysteries that need solving.

In Cranium Big Brain Detective Game, you must work together to search the massive map, spot clever clues, and close all the cases before time runs out.

Cruel Tunes is the perfect culmination of music, laughter, and roasting your stupid friends. Perfect for parties, pregames, or the get together after your grandma's funeral. No matter what this game is a lot of fun and you're sure to have a laugh or two while playing some tunes that define a generation. Feel free to create your own playlists or utilize the ones we have created on Spotify or Apple Music.

Put on a song, lay down the funniest reason you'd be listening to that song, let a judge decide the winner. First to 8 cards wins.

No music knowledge is required. Simply play a song and roast the judge based on the reason they would be listening to the song.

—description from the designer

In Miracle Ticket players become jam band parking lot Wooks who are racing to find the elusive "miracle ticket" that gets them into the show for free.

Players utilize "buzz" cards (acid, shrooms, nitrous, nugs, edibles, molly) to move themselves or another player forward on a path that ends at the entrance to the music venue. Veggie burrito cards a defense against being "dosed" by another player and can alternately allow a player to move backward 1 space. The path is littered with beneficial, neutral and penalty spaces which will inform which player to dose.

The Miracle Ticket is located halfway along the path and held by whichever player is in the lead. The winner is the first player to reach the venue with Miracle Ticket in hand.

—description from the designer

A game of exploration and deduction where players race to find Bigfoot. Set in the wilderness of Bigfoot country players must explore the map in search for evidence of the mysterious creature. Finding enough evidence will allow players to decode the location/clue cards around the board and eliminate symbols from their hunt. Eliminate all but three symbols to find where Bigfoot is hiding. But beware the forest is full of danger...

—description from the designer

This game has questions, but no right answers. You have to choose between two options. Each round can turn into an incredible battle of opinions, evidence, manipulated facts, and counter-arguments.

The fact is that the question before everyone else is posed by the presenter, who must be convinced that one of the options is the right one. And the person whose opinion influenced the presenter's decision the most will get the most points. Fight, be eloquent, speak more, louder, more convincingly!

We prepared a Corrosion Mini Expansion for you to print at home! The starting machines only take up half a piece of A4 paper but changes the game play a lot. From the beginning each player has an individual starting machine to speed up the start of the game. Just go to our website to find the print file and rules in German and English.

-description from publisher's website
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
Take care of your Meadow: Downstream and protect it with special card sleeves! The set includes 100 transparent sleeves in Meadow cards size, providing protection from dirt, moisture and loss of color. Additionally, there is an “N” envelope with several cards as a mini-expansion to the game!
Cards & Sleeves pack is a language independent expansion for Meadow: Downstream.

What is Meadow?
Meadow is a board game in which players take the role of wanderers watching nature. Equipped with a map, they stroll through the picturesque surroundings, looking for inspiration and capturing breathtaking views. Players are driven by passion and curiosity, but also by competition for the title of the keenest nature observer! It will be awarded to whoever scores the most points from the observed species of animals and plants, landscapes and souvenirs collected from the hike. Competition continues by the fire, where players compete in achieving the goals of their expeditions.

What is Meadow: Downstream?
Meadow: Downstream is an expansion for Meadow inspired by the fascinating nature of aquatic environments. Start a new journey to observe flora, fauna and landscapes connected with rivers, streams and lakes. Go kayaking down the river and compete with others on the new fields of exploration.

Meadow: Downstream includes over 80 new cards depicting wildlife living in an aquatic environment and a new thematic envelope to discover. Kayaking mechanism allows players to score extra points for progressing down the river. Adjust the level of competition with two-sided river board. Choose between a fast stream and calm river to explore two faces of nature.

—description from the publisher

The Advanced Squad Leader Overlay Bundle contains a re-printing of every overlay (on 37 cardstock sheets) issued by Avalon Hill or MMP except:


     Overlays from MMP's Red Factories
     Deluxe overlays (available in MMP's Deluxe ASL)
     Gavutu-Tanambogo overlays from Avalon Hill's ASL Annual 93b (re-released as a paper map in MMP's Rising Sun)
     Overlay E1 (escarpment) from Avalon Hill's West of Alamein (re-released as board 25e in MMP's Hollow Legions 3rd Ed.)

An enhanced take on classic matching card games with a simpler set-up and fewer pieces than other games, meaning less frustration for parents and preschoolers wanting to play together. There’s a fun twist with Scramble cards as players try to find their favourite Cocomelon characters. 
 To win you need to match a picture (one of three in the display) with one of numerous facedown tokens that will contain that picture.  The person who has the most matches wins...the twist is that some cards cause the facedown tokens to be shuffled (so it isn't purely for memory masters)

boardgame: Willemsen de Koning: Vervoert met zorg
description:
You are a bus driver and are tasked with picking up eight students and delivering them to school, the central point in the middle of the game board. The order in which the students must be picked up and dropped off is different for each player and is on the schedule of his bus panel. You can choose to pick up the students in a different order, but some students insist be the first or last to board the bus. If you don't respect that, you will get negative points at the end of it game, unless you phone the parents or guardians in order to switch to reassure the student is set.

Always make the right choice. Do you go for speed, or do you go for carefulness? The winner is the player who makes the fewest mistakes, but also ensures that everyone was delivered on time.

—description from the designer

1888, in London. The torpor created by the recent murders in Whitechapel has not reached East End punters. While a new assassination is announced by the police, who refuse to reveal the sordid details to the press, the customers of the pub "the White Boar" embark on a day of slightly crazy bets. Their but? Bet on Jack the Ripper's new package.

In this competitive game of deduction and betting, players embody customers of the pub "The White Boar" who have organized some special bets. They will be able, throughout the day, to obtain crucial information on the circumstances of the murder, by bribing their informant, other players or the police. At betting times, they must use deduction and daring, while skillfully managing their supply of Beer tokens, to make the most worthy bets!

—description from the publisher

The players take turns to roll and move. Movements is determined by two number dice and a special die, which shows mathematical operations ( + - *). The combination of the three dice (for example 1 + 5) gives the number of spaces to move forward ( + and *) or backward ( - ). Captured opponent pawns are sent back to the start. The first player to reach space 100 wins the game.
20 additional cards for Rorschach.

Scotland, 1987. Richard Demusa, a professor of ancient Greek at the University of Edinburgh, is found dead in his home with a knife stuck in his throat. One of the police officers assigned to guard the scene of the crime refused to stay at the scene because he felt so uncomfortable.
Between myth and reality, will you discover the truth?

Crime Zoom: Mauvais Oeil is the sixth case in the Crime Zoom series.

Crime Zoom is a series of investigation game for 1 or more players which plays in about an hour.

Each investigation tells a different story, but almost always begins with a crime scene.

This crime scene is spread over several cards to form a great illustration. To investigate, simply flip a card to take a closer look. An item intrigues you? Flip the card over and find out what the little piece of paper on the bedside table is.

An address? You can now take the card that corresponds to this track. Unless another element on the crime scene appeals you even more?

In Crime Zoom, you will conduct your investigation freely. Discuss among players to choose the tracks to follow. When you think you have solved the case, go to the questionnaire. Who is guilty? What is their motive? What is the murder weapon? And some follow-up questions, of course.

Make sure to identify the culprit, otherwise you will lose the game. But if you answer the questions correctly, the number of cards you do not reveal will determine your score.

The solution will answer each of the questions. The epilogue will tell the whole story or a testimony history to understand the plot that has been played.

-description from publisher

From the box description...

“I woke last night shaking from a frightful dream. We have come to the edge of the ocean and there is no advancing or retreating.  My own sons may sink in the torrent.  I wish I pray that there be some decent honorable way to put an end to this conflict.  Tone once again reconciled  old friends.  Out cause is righteous and I have no doubt of final success.  But I see out generation and perhaps our hole loaned drowned in blood”.

Sarah Scott was an English novelist, translator, social reformer, and member of the Bluestockings.

Warriors of the America is a fast playing game on the American War of Independence.  Inspired by the very well received game, Warriors of God, this game features the leaders, soldiers, and events that were pivotal in this history changing war.  Players control leaders, soldiers, and fleets on a map that features both the wilds of North America and the more civilized colonized areas.  Major events will shape each season.  The American player must contend with raising money and a less-trained but highly motivated army while preventing the greatest army in the world, the British Army, from snuffing out the fire of the greatest enlightenment of human rights yet seen on earth.

Will you become the bbq master? 
Or is your grill a recipe for disaster? 
The tastiest food may take some time
But if you see guests forming a line 
The infamous BARBE-QUEUE, a wriggling snake
You need to speed it up, don’t burn your steak
So try to give your guests a blast
By serving your food tasty and fast!

Barbe-Queue is a quick and tasty game where you display your grill skills against your opponents. Against each other, but also with each other to avoid the barbe-queue getting too long.

Players prepare food on the barbeque, which is placed in the center of the table. Each turn they choose to serve guests who are waiting in line, add more food to the barbeque if there is space available, or move their food on the barbeque to the next level. Serving your food the fastest does not guarantee the win: the longer prepared food is tastier and worth more points. And not all guests want the same food. So choose your grill strategy wisely and become the bbq master of all time!

—description form the publisher

You and your fellow tight-belted minstrels meet at the Hungry Troubadour Tavern. There is precious little coin to be found here, but there are vegetables galore to fill your empty bellies if you sing for your supper.

A Bard Day’s Night is a 2-4 player card game of bidding, bluffing, and belting out verses. Players are bards brainstorming their next performance for the tavern-goers, while they also fill their pockets with the vegetables that the audience are hurling at them to express their “appreciation” for the performances. When a ballad is completed, players bid their food to claim different parts of the ballad. When the tavern closes for the night, those who performed the most popular themes will find a few coins tossed their way instead of salad ingredients. The bard with the most coins wins, and has to buy the next round!

When playing the game, the bottom of the box also serves as the tavern table, holding extra food cards for those who lose their bids.

-description from graphic designer

boardgame: Power Rangers: Heroes of the Grid – Zord Pack #3
description:
The mysterious Trey of Triforia gifted the Zeo Rangers the Super Zeo Gems, and with them the ability to use the powerful (and geometrically appealing) Super Zeo Zords. Add these zords and the Warrior Wheel to Heroes of the Grid with this pack of 6 new zords and 2 megazords.

Includes:
Super Zeo Zord I card
Super Zeo Zord II card
Super Zeo Zord III card
Super Zeo Zord IV card
Super Zeo Zord V card
Warrior Wheel card
Zeo Mega Battlezord card
Super Zeo Megazord card
family: Game: Power Rangers: Heroes of the Grid

description:
Light boardgame based on Finnish sport Pesäpallo, which is somewhat similar to baseball.

Players draft teams and then play through 2 innings each. At the start of each inning, both players sort their player to deck as they see fit. Much of the game after that is solved through dice rolls.

There are also rules for 3 or 4 players.

DISUYEDV is a card-game system based on the Cherokee Syllabary. It is designed with four ways to play, though the system is robust enough to allow players to come up with their own games fairly easily. The four ways it is designed to be played are:

ADANELODI (Arrange!)- A strategy game for two to six players; collect sets of three cards while treating the discard pile as a shared hand. Similar to the classic, card game, Rummy, but with a few, key differences which create an entirely new (and fun!) experience.
Ganesquaduga (Cartwheel)- A raucous, four-player, party game where players race to collect the numbers 1-13 in their hand, but with a twist! The player you just asked for a Seven might start a Cartwheel, and force you to pass some of your cards to the player on your right... and maybe even your whole hand!
Galkwogi Iyanitsila (Seven Fires)- A solitaire game where you must build a fire to start seven other fires. Bearing elements of Free-Cell, Spider, and traditional Solitaire, this unique take on the idea of solitaire is easy to learn, and fun!
Replace a deck of playing cards- The DISUYEDV deck can easily be used to play any game that is possible with a standard deck of playing cards. Instructions to do so are included with the deck.

boardgame: Alice in Wonderland (fan expansion for Arkham Horror: The Card Game)
description:
Alice in Wonderland is an 8-part campaign for Arkham Horror: The Card Game adapted from Alice’s Adventures in Wonderland and Through the Looking-Glass by Lewis Carroll.
Darkened Dreams

Arkham is the home of many strange and frightening mysteries, but this time, mystery comes to Arkham chasing after the young woman Alice Liddell. You are one of the few witnesses to see this hidden menace and believe the threat it poses, and to you goes the responsibility of stopping Alice’s dreams from merging with reality. Worse still, the shadowy eater of dreams Gurathnaka is taking an active hand in this distortion to consume all of Earth for its endless hunger. Your course is clear — to enter Wonderland and stop this dark scheme!

—description from the designer
family: Game: Arkham Horror – The Card Game

description:
A four card pack that adds one Dragon per Lair. This pack is included in the Kickstarter version of the base game but is also available on the publisher's website.

The pack also includes a punchboard with ten Bounty tiles and a rules card:

During setup one Dragon card is placed above its respective Lair card (but underneath the regular monster cards).

During gameplay, if a Dragon card is revealed, two random Bounty tiles are placed face-up on that card. The first player to slay a Dragon earns the noted Influence and chooses one of the Bounty tiles to take as their Reward, but the Dragon stays in play. The second player to slay the Dragon earns the noted Influence and the remaining Bounty tile, then removes the Dragon card from the game.

Additionally a new Dragon Banner is introduced in the Bounty tiles. This Dragon Banner is scored at the end of the game as if it were a Banner Privilege tile and is a different Banner than those in the base game.
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
Twin raiders is a Print and Play game in which you will have to explore and find the best path to reach the idols hidden in the lost temple.
In this strategy game you will compete with another player to be the first to find all the idols. You will have to find the best path and be fast to exploit all the opportunities as they arise during the game.

—description from the designer

An extension for the Minigolf Designer board game, bringing new design challenges, a campaign mode and event cards.

The box also contains a Putting Dice mini-Game that let you play through the minigolf course that you have designed, using custom dice to simulate your putt.

Masters of the Arena is the new strategy board game that will challenge you to become the ultimate master! Inspired by MOBA-style games, you control your own heroes and fight in an arena to become the winner. With a variety of available skills and strategies, each match is unique and exciting. Combining elements of RPG and board games, Masters of the Arena is perfect for strategy game lovers and MOBA fans. Join your friends and fight to be the best in the arena!

—description from the designer
In this 2-player only version of Monsterjäger you start the monster mixer and try hit the the shown monster first with your sticky hand.

Warbling trumpets blare through cheap-sounding loudspeakers as the announcer barks an introduction: "Welcome, one and all, to the Khrag Pit Arena! Tonight! A showcase of spectacular and thrilling contests! Eat, drink, and prepare to be amazed!"

The Khrag Pit Arena expansion adds new items, characters, and locations to the core set! Add components from the core set to the expansion components to play an all new gladiator game!

Use the arena board for a standalone gladiator game and in the core Dark Venture game.

—description from the publisher

The former king of Darkgrange, ousted and murdered in a coup, has miraculously returned! The Alderkang is constructing a powerful army to take back his throne.

This 20 card box of new characters, items, and locations is added to your core set! Includes 3 punch-out sheets of standees and tokens.

—description from the publisher

This mini-expansion box assembles a collection representing some of the most foul creatures created when the magik of the Cataclysm swept through Darkgrange!

This 20 card box of new characters, items, and locations can be added to your core set! Includes 3 punch-out sheets of standees and tokens.

—description from the publisher

In this game we will have to use biological clues, such as the type of teeth and the toxicity of the snakes, to stack the cards one on top of the other until we only have one in hand.
In this way we will go in each game learning about how to identify the different species present in the Colombian Amazonia.

CONTENTS
The game consists of 60 cards: 13 cards for each family (Boidae, Colubridae, Elapidae, Viperidae), 4 jokers and 4 instructions. Each card has the following information: family name, scientific name of the species and common name, the relevant characteristic in the photo that allows it to be recognized as dangerous (red triangle), and harmless (green triangle) and the icon of the type of dentition. Two cards from each family are punishment cards. There are 4 jokers that represent the 4 types of dentition: aglyphous, solenoglyphous, opisthoglyphous and proteroglyphous; each informs about the family or families that have it, its icon, the characteristics of the dentition in text and in a drawing, and if it is associated with dangerous (red triangle) or harmless (green triangle) snakes.

boardgame: Power Rangers: Heroes of the Grid – Scenario Book 2
description: The follow-up to the Fan Appreciation Kit, Scenario Book 2 includes the next 12 narrative Scenarios, previously individually released online as Scenarios 13-24.
family: Game: Power Rangers: Heroes of the Grid

description:
SHIBUYA120 is a competitive card game based on real data stats, where both players pursue the victory of a football game simulation.

Act as the Manager of your football team and win your opponent avatars on the SHIBUYA120 multiverse.

Draw cards from the same 120-card deck to strategically scout your team players from a variety of 10 multiverses. Decide your first lineup on the table and make your first move.

Technical skills, physical and mental attributes and special abilities are played in combination with tactical decisions from your Manager's card. Master the gameplay to keep ball control and discard rivals before scoring a goal.

High interaction with your opponent, easy to play and challenging to find the best synergies. Every duel is different and all matches are unique.

—description from the designer

Welcome race fans and gaming enthusiasts to the world’s fastest and exciting sport in history-Top Fuel-Funny Car-Pro Stock Drag Racing. The all-time greats in each series have gathered together, all considered to be in their prime, to enter into a short ten national season to see who can be crowned champion. For the love of racing, this is a simple simulation racing the all-time greats against each other in some exciting fast action racing. The time frame of this all-time championship is around early 21st century or late 20th century corresponding to the cars top speeds and is considered a quarter mile track for all the series. The game uses a two die mechanic for each car and an optional mile per hour per race race, and the driver having top speed for a season Nationals event gains bonus points.

—description from the designer

Try to stay in the game by placing the shapes in your hand in a limited area. Do not think that everything will be easy, you will need squares when creating a shape, and these squares have different properties. I must say there are many things you can do with these. In short, a fun game where you can be creative and please keep reading.

How To play?


     Deck both Square cards and Shape cards separately and put 1 Square card in the middle of the table with the back side up. That square in the middle of the table is the Center square.
     After completing the installation as written above, you can start the tour. The game consists of 2 rounds and at the end of the 2nd round, whoever reaches the highest score wins, if there is a draw, the 3rd round is played.
     The player whose turn it is in the round draws 1 Shape card and takes as many square cards as the number written on the Shape card, then places the squares in accordance with their shape.
     The player who places a square 6 squares away from the center square loses the round and the other player gets a point.


—description from the designer

The Nightmare expansion takes you to the spooky side of the mind, with Nightmare Dreams, Metamorphoses Grief Layers, Uncanny Clients, and more.

These chilling images might haunt you at first - but don't be too afraid; your emotional-support pet will be by your side to help.

"A mysterious shadow has fallen across Darkgrange. Many that were once bastions of righteousness have become possessed by a cryptic, evil force. They wander the land as unthinking husks, attacking man and beast with abandon. You recognize this sickness as THE DARKNESS, an incantation associated with the Ancient of Death, DHOREGAT KELT. You must disperse this ancient evil before you succumb to it!"

CRAWL! is a solo or 2-player game mode that utilizes the components of the Dark Venture Core Set (plus new characters, items, locations, and quests), activating them in a different way with the use of encounter tokens and new game rules.

In CRAWL! all Dark Venture enemies and unplayed heroes are sorted into separate decks based on their difficulty. Items are separated by type and the map is laid out, ready to explore. Tokens representing encounters are placed on each map location. When your hero enters a location, the token is flipped to reveal a possible enemy and treasure. Fight and kill enchanted enemies or disenchant them, it's your choice. BUT BE CAREFUL! At some point in the game Dhoregat Kelt, Ancient of Death, will appear and attempt to enchant your hero! Defeat him to win the game.

Disgusting Medieval is a new addition to Medieval Suffering. It will diversify your playing games with cards of new townspeople, the most vicious and disgusting characters that could only get into this fun game.

You and your friends will plunge into the trash atmosphere of the Middle Ages, where unsanitary conditions coexist with extreme religiosity, entire cities go crazy eating bread with ergot, and feudal lords settle their political differences by means of duels and assaults. Take on the role of ruler of a medieval castle and put the most devout citizens under your protection, but don't let goats among the herd of lambs: witches, heretics and other sinners. It is better to leave them to the rivals and let them suffer their own wicked wickedness!

description:
When the quarantine ended, the people of the medieval villages poured out into the streets to celebrate with a great feast.

At the sound of joyful songs, the clinking of glasses, and the clatter of dancing feet, all manner of evil spirits and devils crawled out of their holes.

Anyone they knew could be a werewolf or a ghoul. The atmosphere is unhealthy!

Now ghouls drink the blood of babes in the comfortable streets of your cities, devils tempt monks, and knights prepare for battle with the dragon.

A new type of inhabitant has been added called UNHOLY CREATURE, these characters stand on a green background.

They are mixed into the usual deck of suffering inhabitants, they can be drawn and, as usual, put into your town or into the town of your opponent.

Among all sorts of evil things, two special cards, a ghost and a werewolf, have been added to the Feasts and Devils expansion.

Now you can make your favorite resident immortal or turn a useless Leper into a ruthless and savage killer.

With the new addition you need to:

     Disband all the Plague Doctors
     Put away the vials with the traces of epidemics
     Isolate the Leper
     Kick out all the useless peasants


But don't be sad, they'll be replaced by all kinds of evil and other characters!

A new holiday deck has been added. It has 13 cards.

For example, the Bellethain Spring Festival requires each town to burn one of its inhabitants.

The old relics in Feasts and Devils have been replaced with new Cursed Relics.

description:
Quiznödig - At the party is a fun party booster with a fun mix of tricky questions, humor and unnecessary knowledge. 165 crazy and insanely fun questions that are guaranteed to lift the mood at the party. Be prepared for lots of laughs and quirky answers!

The perfect game for a fun night with friends.

In each round (depending on the number of players), place 5 picnic cards on the table face up. There are 6 types of picnic cards (sticky, hot, liquid, sugar and baskets), each type has different characteristics and points.
Each player chooses which of their bugs they will use in this round. Choose your bugs carefully, each one has different strength and abilities.
We place bugs on the picnic in turn order (Bugs' abilities interact with other players and picnic cards). When all the bugs have been placed, we will check which player has more power on each picnic card to find out who gets each food card.

At the end of the last round, count the points of the picnic cards you have collected to find out which player is the winner.

—description from the designer

Enjoy a family game night full of fun with this Play & Win Switch Blocks Board Game.

Take 5 blocks and match the pattern on the card to win! The pressure is on as the fastest person wins the game! With 50 rapid time challenges there's so much to be had.

Product features:

Match blocks, match cards, instructions
Ideal gift for any occasion
Great family game to promote logical thinking
Suitable for ages 6+

—description from the publisher

This deck of cards contains three sets: Equipment, Artifacts, and Ill tides.

Each adds something new to gang building, from gondolas to row and single-use grenades through to powerful and unique relics. There are even cards for making your gang a little worse: the Ill Tides are washing in to level the playing field!

Made from high quality playing card material, these cards are oversized at 100mm x 60mm. Contains 33 cards.

—description from the publisher

This deck of cards depicts the five different disciplines of magic. The pack contains 36 cards, each with a magic spell on for quick reference and ease of play, along with a cover card detailing their use.

With lavish artwork and easy to read rules, this deck is the ideal purchase for anyone looking to use magic in their games of Carnevale.

Made from high quality playing card material, these cards are oversized at 100mm x 60mm.

—description from the publisher

These 36 cards contain every Agenda in the game, from killing opposing leaders to falling into the canal. Simply draw the cards and follow the rules on the cover card to score extra Victory Points in your games of Carnevale.

With lavish artwork and easy to read rules, this deck is the ideal purchase for anyone playing Carnevale. This upgrade to the rules in the rulebook makes picking Agendas easier than ever, and provides you with a handy reminder throughout the game!

Made from high quality playing card material, these cards are oversized at 100mm x 60mm.

Bitmax and his friends live in the Blue Forest. Keep an eye on their movements using your memory.

Each card is the same on both sides, except for one detail.

While players keep their eyes closed, the guard turns over one of the cards, looks for any changes, and says “1, 2, 3 Bitmax!”. Then, the other players open their eyes.

In turns, and starting with the player on the guard’s right, players will say which card it has been changed and why.

boardgame: A Brilliant Little Affair: The Battle of Chrysler's Farm, November 11, 1813
description:
“Come on lads! Let us see how you will deal with these militiamen!” –US Brigadier General Leonard Covington’s last words to his men during the attack at Chrysler’s Farm.

A Brilliant Affair is an easy to learn/teach game on the battle of Chrysler's Farm. Outnumbered nearly by nearly two to one, the British, Canadian and First Nations force inflicted a stunning defeat upon the invading US force led by General James Wilkenson, one of the most inept and corrupt military leaders in US history.

Players use cards to activate their units/formations and six sided die to play the very interactive and competitive game. A Brilliant Little Affair is the debut title in a series of games on battles fought over control of Canada during the War if 1812.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Men of War: Indochina 1946-1954 – French Foreign Legion
description:
Men of War (MoW) French Indochina-French Foreign Legion is Module 2 on the standalone Solitaire Tactical Book Wargame series designed to re-create modern low-intensity conflicts at the tactical level. MoW is an infantry-centric old-school hex and counter wargame system that mimics the nuances of modern small unit leadership, fire, and maneuver, primarily team and squad-based formations.
In this second installment of the series, “Indochina (1946-1954)-French Foreign Legion”, the player controls units from the famed French Foreign Legion fighting under the French flag to maintain a fragile foothold in a post-WWII Indochina. Fighting the disciplined communist Viet Minh guerrilla cadre, French units must navigate and engage insurgents through difficult terrain in a new type of war. The game's scale is at the tactical level with each hex grid representing approximately 40 meters, turns representing a few minutes, and units representing teams of three to five soldiers. A dynamic and aggressive enemy artificial intelligence bot keeps players guessing enemy disposition on every turn.

Features
Solitaire Small Unit Tactical Gameplay.
Unique Hexagonal Geomorphic Hexagonal maps depicting jungle Terrain linked for larger scenarios.
Ten Historically inspired Mission.
Support Weapons include Light Machineguns, Grenades, Flamethrowers, and Booby Traps.
Easy to Learn six Page Rulebook.
Deep tactical gameplay.
A Dynamic and aggressive A.I. Bot/Enemy System keeps you guessing every turn.
Portable; all you need is this book a D10 and D6 dice (or smartphone dice app) and a marker.

—description from the publisher

Disgruntled Decks is a card game for military service members and grizzled Veterans who enjoy laughing together about their time in the service. With a unique blend of descriptive language and military themes, Disgruntled Decks gives one more reason for service members and Veterans to talk about their shared experiences while having fun in the process.

We strongly believe that humor is healing, and some Veterans still have a good amount of healing left to do. We hope to provide some of that humor with Disgruntled Decks.

—description from the publisher

Battle of the Seas is nautical wargame set in XVII century however with no historical scenario.
The game included 10 ships for each player Blue and Red)along with cards to direct wind changes, player movement, battle scenarios, and ship damage.
The task of the game is to reach the enemy port with the transport ship (with out guns)Wind direction and the battles between ships are resolved using card deck for each scenario.
During the battle each player draws a card which determinates result of gun fire or boarding. There are serval damages the ship can receive- damage sails, lost sails, ship fire or ship sinking.

This is an expansion for Holotype: Mesozoic North America. Game play does not change, but new cards are added to the base game, including:

7 unique Pterosaur specimen cards
3 new Field Expedition cards
3 Gastrolith Trace Fossil cards
3 new Global Objectives
2 new Personal Objectives

Description for base game:
A fast-paced light-strategy worker placement board game about paleontology for 2-5 players.

Players use their Paleontologist, Grad Student and Field Assistant workers to gather fossils, do research and publish new Dinosaurs and Marine Reptiles as Holotypes. Personal and semi-collaborative Global Objectives feature modern paleontology concepts such as cladistics and taxonomy.

The player with the most Victory Points from publishing Holotypes, completing Personal Objectives and contributing to Global Objectives wins.

Mercado Central is a fun card game, recommended for 2 to 8 players from 8 years of age and with a duration of about 15 minutes.

Players will have to visit the stalls of our market and get the necessary products to elaborate recipes of main dishes and desserts of Spanish gastronomy. Play your cards right and get ahead of your opponents by stealing products, changing the shopping cart or becoming a VIP customer.

Be the fastest to visit all the stalls and don't run out of ingredients for your menu!

The game, in addition to offering a good time of fun, seeks to promote the tradition and culture of food markets among young people. Discovering the different market stalls, the origin of their products and the ingredients that make up the recipes.

description:
The Multiverse and its many disparate realities have always been a place of great pandemonium — and of great interest! Hundreds of bizarre stories have come out of the Sentinel Comics book known as Disparation, and now it is time for those stories to leave their mark on your tabletop!

Sentinels of the Multiverse: Disparation is the latest expansion to the Definitive Edition of the co-operative comic book card game Sentinels of the Multiverse! Powerful heroes stand together against villains from disparate realities, each a threat to the worlds our heroes hold dear — and even to reality itself!

And psychic warrior The Visionary hopes to save this reality's version of herself before it's too late!

description:
Рыцарское сражение ("Knight 's Battle")  is a tactical and strategic military board game for two players aged seven years and older (7+). Children will be transported to the Middle Ages, a real battle will unfold on the playing field.

From the beginning, cards with warriors are laid out under the protection of castle walls: blue – in a castle with a blue flag, yellow – with a yellow flag. Figures of the same type are placed on top of each other on one square. The first participant of the battle rolls a die and moves any warrior outside of his castle by as many cells as there are dots on the die. Movement is possible in any direction except diagonal. You can only move through unoccupied cells. Any figure starts its movement from the castle with a red square. As soon as one of the participants in the game has moved all his pieces outside of his castle, he can go on the offensive. A knight and a crossbowman can defeat any enemy warrior; a man–at-arms - anyone except a knight; an archer is able to defeat only an archer, a man-at-arms, a militia, a standard-bearer; a militia and an infantryman can defeat a man-at-arms, a militia, a standard-bearer; a standard-bearer cannot defeat anyone.

The victory is awarded to the one of the participants of the duel who will be the first to remove the enemy's standard-bearer from the battlefield, or his standard-bearer will enter the enemy's fortress.

—user summary

The adventurers must get the ring to the mountain by any means necessary!

Fly, You Fools! is a one-vs-many dexterity game using a single card. It combines elements of dodgeball and disc golf and can be played anywhere with up to eleven people. One player plays as "the mountain", everyone else is "the party", and the card is "the ring". The party's goal is to throw or fling the ring at the mountain while the mountain's goal is to survive ten turns without getting hit. Sounds easy? Adventurers beware! The power of the ring corrupts and can hinder your ability to throw! Depending on how it lands, players may have to throw with their weak hand or with their eyes closed.

Fly, You Fools! cleverly packs an entire epic saga into a single-card game. It will have players of all ages laughing, yelling, and crying as they desperately journey throughout the entire house in pursuit of the cursed mountain while it crawls, ducks, and leaps to evade them.

—description from the designer

De Hàmster Kùmmt Wieder (Hamster goes home) is an assymetric, fast-paced multiplayer board game for 2–5 players age 8 and up. The game demonstrates the struggle of hamsters with and against their natural enemies in their habitat in Alsace. Like most good stories, there is a fictional hero, the Super Hamster. A box includes a detailed playing field, special ability cards - all this is hand-printed, 22 miniatures of hamsters and predators, and a dice to solve ingame contests. Rules are simple and intuitive, each team has its advantages and disadvantages.

—description from the designer

The end is near. Resist crises. Arm yourself. Fight. Face your opponents. The hour of the Apocalypse has come. The time has come to take up arms.

Smile Life Apocalypse offers many new features for even more interactions, surprises and fun! The new mechanics bring a multitude of unexplored possibilities to the game. Always with as much humor and second degree.

In the Middle Ages it was not easy to develop your small coastal village and satisfy the King and his whims even when you had to face incessant Viking raids! A strategy game in which you will have to manage your resources wisely, develop your village, protect it by anticipating enemy raids from looters and satisfy royal whims! description:
Every good gardener knows that the secret of a beautifully landscaped area lies in making the best use of the resources that you have available!

Head-to-head against your opponent, fill the flower beds on your grid according to the shapes rolled on the pattern die, strategically using the flowers in your hand.

Score for every flower bed that you fill, score more if that flower bed is filled with the same type of flowers and score the most if it is filled with the same type of flowers all of the same colour.

Out-garden your opponent by scoring more and finishing with the most impressive floral display in this exceptional puzzle game!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Fish 'n' Flips: Sea Lion Promo Cards
description: Nine sea lion cards for Fish 'n' Flips, given out at SPIEL '19.

Card game in which you must show your knowledge about the zootechnical potential of different wild species.
The player in turn chooses a category present in his card and bets to have a higher or lower value in said category than the other players. The player who best handles the characteristics set by the player in turn wins the round.

The game was developed in conjunction with a scientific article in which the statistical values associated with each of the parameters of the cards were analyzed, so the values in each of them correspond to the results of the study.

Introduction of the associated article:
In Latin America, the use of wildlife for different purposes is ancestral; In the last decades, the use of subsistence, that of local sale, sportive and commercial hunting stands out. The latter, related to the potential and the value or interest that exists in the species that is the object of the same. From the perspective of the agricultural sector, it seeks to meet demands for current anthropic uses such as food, skins, pets, scientific research or conservation, based on the sustainable management of wild populations.

To guarantee the sustainable use and management of wildlife, it is necessary to establish parameters and management criteria that are generated from scientific, cultural and socioeconomic knowledge of the species that we believe have some type of productive potential. Currently one of the challenges facing the agricultural sector is the development of innovative proposals that are consistent with the social, environmental and economic needs of the country. The assessment of the potential of wild species in Colombia is of vital importance to face these challenges.

In this document an approximation to the conceptual definition of zootechnical potential of a wild species is made and an evaluation of this potential is made for 48 species of wild fauna (native and exotic) that have been traditionally used in Colombia. The results are also part of a didactic strategy based on the evaluation of the zootechnical potential of wild fauna species, as a proposal for pedagogical innovation (cards attached to this booklet).

Attention space explorers!
  It's time to board your ships and find the best space route to travel from one planet to another in this fun filler for 1 to 6 players.

Each player will have a personal board. Two dice will be rolled each turn. One of the values will be assigned to each player. With it, they must decide whether to advance along the space route (bringing it closer to the destination planet) or activate a sector of the ship to earn points and modifiers for upcoming turns.
The game ends when one or more players reach the end of the space route, however the winner will be the one with the most points at the end of the game.

—description from the designer

You have been sent to investigate strange events in a distant region. Loud noises and paranormal presences have been reported.

In this card game you must protect your sanity level, if you completely lose sanity you will be out of the game. Each card has a MONSTER RANK in roman numbers. Creatures of the Cthulhu Mythos starting with the most powerful OUTER GODS (I), then GREAT OLD ONES (II), MINOR GODS (III) and CULTIST (IV).

Each player will start with 5 cards in his hand and one mission card. Depending on your strategy, you can group cards to launch attacks and make other players lose their sanity, or you can decide to group cards that allow you to replenish your sanity points.

Choose wisely the card you will play or your sanity will be drain by outer space beings.

There are mission cards. Complete the missions and fill it with the tokens to win the game.

It's time to organize the sock´s drawer!
Have you seen the pair of these socks around?
Are you sure this sock is a match?

GOAL
Players must place two cards together to form a valid pair of socks. But none are exactly like the other!

—description from the designer

É hora de arrumar a gaveta de meias! 
Você viu o par desta meia por aí?
Tem certeza que essa meia é desse par?

OBJETIVO
Os jogadores devem juntar duas cartas para formar pares de meias. Mas não tem nenhuma exatamente igual à outra!

—description from the designer (Portuguese)

Test your deduction skills in this wacky riddle game! Observe the illustrations and be the first player to grab the rubber dwarf to give the word that starts with UN NAIN... If no one finds the word, you are entitled to a clue. The team or player who finishes the game with the highest score wins the game!

Futory Cards Duality takes players on an exciting ride through the universe. Exotic landmarks and creatures will serve those able to control them. It offers an expanded battle system with intuitive card combinations that make every game unique.

Futory Cards is a deck building game in which up to four players buy cards from the Bazaar to create the strongest deck and defeat their opponents. With Landmarks, Creatures and Artifacts, the players go through four phases in which they try to remove the 24 Time Points from the other players.

Once 12 Time Points are lost, the Light Die gets removed from the player and they can no longer get up to 24 Time Points. A player has lost the game after their Dark Die gets removed.

If a player can no longer draw cards from their Future Pile, their History Pile gets shuffled and creates a new Future Pile. This dynamic feature enables long term strategic thinking.

Futory Cards Duality can also be linked with other titles from the Trilogy, allowing even more strategic variety and a higher player count.

—description from the publisher

In this game, everyone chooses a question among the three proposed on a card and reads it aloud.

From left to right, each of the other players responds.

After each answer, the players land in a dark or bright space.

At the end of the round, it is the last player to have answered, which designates the winning space.

EMPIRE is a fast-paced and exciting hand-management game, and 2-4 players can have a blast in about 20 minutes. (If you only play one game. You'll probably want to play again!)

Use action cards (Acquire, Release, and Vanquish) to manage your hand and assemble the assets of your EMPIRE (a Hero, a Ship, a Fleet, a Planet, a System, and a Galaxy) while foiling your adversaries as they attempt to build their own!

The first player to have all 6 assets and NO OTHER CARDS (Ahh, there's the rub!) in their hand rules the EMPIRE!

—description from the publisher

An expansion for Planepita that was released in two different colors (pink and purple), each allowing for an additional player.

Note: The six-player game is only supported in the Team Play Variant.

boardgame: Magic: The Gathering – Core Set 2021 Planeswalker Deck: Chandra, Flame's Catalyst
description:
Planeswalker Decks familiarize players who are interested in Magic with basic strategy, plus the games setting, characters, and mechanics of the latest set. Each deck comes with a foil Planeswalker card not found anywhere else.

Powerful, passionate, possessing a short fuse, Chandra is always ready to bring the heat. Launch a burning barrage directly at your opponent's life total until nothing but ash remains.

—description from publisher

boardgame: Magic: The Gathering – Core Set 2021 Planeswalker Deck: Garruk, Savage Herald
description:
Planeswalker Decks familiarize players who are interested in Magic with basic strategy, plus the games setting, characters, and mechanics of the latest set. Each deck comes with a foil Planeswalker card not found anywhere else.

Cursed no longer, Garruk is free to stalk the multiverse for the prey of his choosing. Overrun your opponent with a ceaseless stampede of really, really big creatures.

—description from publisher

So you have mastered every angle in Mission to Planet Hexx: the Core Game?  Then the Beyond Mission to Planet Hexx expert expansion is the logical next step for YOU!

In Episode II: Beyond Mission to Planet Hexx, the race to uncover the mysteries of Planet Hexx expands to encompass the inhabitants of dozens more fascinating worlds. Background characters from the original game shift to become the focus of the story, as totally new characters are introduced.

"Ever since members of the first successful expedition to Planet Hexx returned to tell the tale, the Star Academy, the Snooger Conglomerate, and even the Empress herself have all taken an interest. Will YOU be the first to uncover the awesome secrets of this remarkable world?"

Eighty-eight new cards showcasing five new mechanics (Boosters, Tokens, All-Play, Hybrid cards, and Mega-Mission Files) will breathe new life into your Mission to Planet Hexx game. Explore new combos or customize a new 120 card deck - the possibilities are endless!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Vecinos inesperados: Relatos de la fauna silvestre en Bogotá
description:
Card game associated with the production of the book and documentary film of the same name.
The game seeks to publicize the zoological diversity present in Bogotá city through photographs and biological data of various species.
On each turn, each player must take the top card from their deck. The player in turn must select a characteristic of the card he took, and bet against the other players if his card has a higher or lower value than those of the other players. The player who best meets the condition keeps all the cards played in the round. The player who manages to make at least 22 cards wins.

A brand new Gembearer (starting deck) for Gemwielders Deckbuilding Game. It comes with two handy cards to track life and power.

The Dagger is made for the cunning tactician, alternating feint attacks and premeditated strikes, meant to cause maximum harm. And what better feeling than to lay a trap and watch your opponent walk into it unsuspectingly?

Guns N'Bosses is a rogue-lite, cooperative, medium-weight, dice/card/bag building, board game designed by Nicolas de Tauriac and features around 80 weapons and 40 enemies illustrated by Julien Boulet.

You are mercenaries sent onto a distant planet to chase hostiles and prepare future colonisation. With the small budget allocated to this mission, you will have to find yourself some heavier weapons on the remainings of previous teams.
In a first part, you will encounter waves of enemies to loot. Then when you feel ready, you can confront the boss and try to defeat it !

Choose wisely your equipement to match your gameplay but also  that of your crewmates
Balance your arsenal by adding or removing dices in your bag to sustain fire
Prepare your guns, charge them and fire them at the right moment
Never let down your crewmates and assist them with healing abilities or by taking shots for them

If you enjoy rogue-lites video games, intense arena boss fight and shooter-looter, I think Guns N'Bosses is a mission for you to take on !

—description from the designer

Corona de Aragón will transport you to an exciting era in which your decisions during the game could change the course of history. Travel through the events and enclaves that forged a territory that came to dominate the Mediterranean. What are you waiting for to make history?

Learn by playing and banish the myths surrounding the birth of the Crown of Aragon. This edition of the game will focus on the first years of the history of the Crown of Aragon, which emerged after the dynastic union between the kingdom of Aragon and the county of Barcelona with the marriage between Petronila and Ramon Berenguer.

Crown of Aragon is a fun card game, recommended for 2 to 4 players from 8 years of age and with a duration of about 30 minutes.

Battles, betrayals, crossroads... Strategy and fun are mixed during the game, where players will have to travel through the enclaves of the Crown to improve their skills and discover the most fascinating historical events. Play your cards right and get ahead of your opponents by using actions and historical objects to sabotage the rest.

—description from the publisher

Expand the Mercado Central game with eight Aragonese traditional recipes.

This pack of additional cards is sold separately from the main game.

The recipes included are:

-Borrajas con almejas
-Cardo con almendras
-Pollo al chilindrón
-Rancho
-Trucha a la aragonesa
-Trenza de Almudévar
-Pastel ruso
-Frutas de Aragón

A bunch of good guys and their old rivals, the Brotherhood of the Cat's Paw, compete for valuable artifacts from the city's mysterious district. In a card duel, you can try playing for both sides, as each offers different strategic options.

The game is played in three rounds, in which you add your own cards to selected stacks of mystery cards to compete for them. You alternate turns until one player completes a round. Then the round is evaluated.

Once the round is over, evaluate the three duels for the mystery card piles in turn. The player who has attached their own cards to the pile with a higher value than their opponent wins the pile of grey cards.

At the end of the third round, players add up the values of all the secret cards they have received. The player with the higher total is the winner.
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description:
This expansion adds six pilots to the list deck of passengers cards.
These pilots can be discarded or played to give.
If played they replace passenger required to free one of the pilot of the plane.

Both players get two game figures of the same color, blue or red. All figures start at the castle. Both dice are rolled. However, you only move the number of spots on one die on the board. You can always choose which of your pieces you want to advance with, but move figures at the start first! If you get on a space of your color, roll the dice again! Two figures of one player may not be on the same space at the same time! If you come to a space on which an opponent's figure is standing, you send it back to the castle. The track makes a circle in the middle of the board. Here you follow the arrows! If you land on the crossing point (black space), you block the way for your opponent. While waiting until you leave the point or get hit there, you are allowed to pass with your own character. You must reach the target spaces with the sword behind the cave entrance with a direct throw. Whoever is the first to get both of their pawns onto the target space of their color wins and returns the magic sword to the castle.

The game was published on the back of a box of "Smacks".

—user summary
family: Theme: King Arthur / The Knights of the Round Table / Camelot

boardgame: Ars Bellum II: Scénarios "Bélisaire, l'épée de l'empereur"
description: In this expansion, find the Roman armies of the East, Persian Sassanid, Vandal and Moorish of the High Middle Ages and carry out the conquest plans of the Emperor Justinian.
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
Bite into vice to the fullest in this extension where all shots are allowed. For better and especially for worse!
All shots are allowed... For better and especially for worse!

Corrosive and politically incorrect humor.

Trash extension contains 55 new cards !

The girls take power and redistribute the cards... Equally!
The Girl Power extension contains 60 new cards including 30 in-game professions in women's version and paid at equal salary!

The players take turns to roll and move. The game begins at "Start und Ziel" by rolling the means of transport. The number thrown only entitles you to occupy a starting space. Whoever throws 1, 2 or 3 travels by train and pays two tokens  into the till. Whoever rolls a 4 or 5 takes the omnibus and pays three tokens. Whoever rolls the 6 travels by plane and pays four tokens. On some spaces events hinder or benefit the players. The winner is whoever finishes first; he gets everything that's in the till.

The game was published inside the comic magazine "Felix".

—user summary

boardgame: Magic: The Gathering – Core Set 2021 Planeswalker Deck: Liliana, Death Mage
description:
Planeswalker Decks familiarize players who are interested in Magic with basic strategy, plus the games setting, characters, and mechanics of the latest set. Each deck comes with a foil Planeswalker card not found anywhere else.

Freed from her previous burdens, Liliana is prepared to take what is rightfully hers. In this case, it's your complete and utter victory fueled by a highly disposable army of the undead.

—description from the publisher

Gyve (pronounced like "jive") is a drawless unification game for two players: Black and White. It is played on the spaces (cells) of an initially empty hexagonal grid of hexagons (board).

Black starts by making one move, then turns alternate with players making exactly two moves per turn, one move after the other. A move is placing a stone of your color on an empty cell adjacent to N groups of your color. N must be the same for the two moves of a turn.

Passing is not allowed, but, if you cannot make exactly two moves, your turn is skipped. When neither player can make two moves, the game ends and the player with fewer groups wins. A group is a stone along with all stones one can reach from it through a series of steps onto adjacent stones of the same color.

				
				
					NotesThe game works best on boards with between 6 and 12 cells per side. For quick games on boards with fewer than 6 cells per side, the pie rule is recommended to prevent Black from easily connecting a central stone to multiple edges of the board. The pie rule gives White the option, on their first turn only, to swap sides with Black instead of making a regular move.

Gyve was inspired by a conversation with Michael Amundsen about both designers' previous contributions to the fewest-groups-wins family of games, namely Bolaños' Yodd and Amundsen's Solder and Elea.

—description from the designer

The goal of Majesty Moose is quite simple: The first player to discard all of their cards wins the round and is given the lowest score. The round continues until players, one by one, have discarded all their cards and one player is left with cards still in hand. The player who got rid of their cards first is the Emperor/Empress and will start the next round followed by the other players in the order developed from the last round -- the last being the individual who still had cards in their hand at the end of the round. The player with the combined lowest score after a certain number of rounds is the winner.

—description from the back of the box

The new and most complete Board Game for Hardcore MLB Fans. 
Experience the Fun and Thrill of Baseball With This Board Game
Enjoy one of the most popular American sports with your friends and family through BaseBoardGame! It is a one-of-a-kind board game that equates to a real baseball game. Rain or shine, day or night, you will never miss out on the fun with our unique board game.

The Players
BaseBoardGame combines the excitement, suspense, and other ingredients of a true baseball game. It has the same number of players and batters are ranked in three groups with different batting averages. The board also contains the same elements of a real field, so you can experience the most common situations of a baseball game.

—description from the publisher

The D-Day Dice: Reinforcements expansion contains 10 Legendary Units to help you conquer those pesky bunkers.

12 Legendary Units (and their special equipment) that you can play in place of the Nations included in D-Day Dice.

This deck of 74 Cards (12 Poker and 62 Small) includes 12 Legendary Units (and their unique items and specialists) and an Award

These units can be used instead of the standard Units in any of the expansions of the core game.

—description from the publisher

A card game in which mischievous twins compete by hacking terminals around town.

Players take the role of one of the twins and place square cards on the field to expand the area under their control. To place a card, it must overlap with a card on the field, either partially or completely, and the overlapping area must be of a different color.

Cards can be rearranged when certain conditions are met.

After the specified number of cards have been used, the player wins when the number of consecutive areas in his or her area exceeds the number of areas in the opponent's area.

—description from the publisher

The Rings Of Saturn is a 2-6 player board game where captains race their space ships from the outer rings of Saturn inward to the planet of Saturn while navigating the difficulties of space travel. The first one to Saturn wins.

Actual gameplay involves a multiple step process where captains 
(1) gain resources from rolling and their generator cards previously purchased,(2-3)trade and buy improvements for space travel or buy travel to the next ring, (4)hire crew members, and finally (5) draw an anomaly card where unfortunate events happen to your crew.

—description from the publisher

In this prison you and your rivals are stuck in a bitter feud and tensions are running high. The race is on to gather Inmate Favor, Guard Favor, and a Shank. Using your Commissary items, quickly purchase Influence in the prison yard. That Influence will be used to buy what you need to complete the deed. There are only two ways out of this mess, and they are to shank or be shanked.

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description: "Dice of the Round Table" is an exciting new dice game for 2 to 4 players. Players will roll their dice and use strategy to defeat their opponents and become the ultimate ruler of the kingdom. Players can choose to attack a knight or king, infiltrate the enemy's castle, poison the enemy king, boost their own morale, or even resurrect a fallen knight. With a combination of luck and strategy, the game is easy to learn but challenging to master, making it perfect for casual and experienced gamers alike. Gather your friends, sharpen your skills, and get ready for an epic battle in "Dice of the Round Table".
family: Theme: King Arthur / The Knights of the Round Table / Camelot

description:
Vector Victor is designed as a demonstration game to make use of Vector Dice and the Vortex Dice Tower.  It is a quick and easy to learn abstract where the directional Vector Dice are slotted in to players ships.  The direction and magnitude shown on the die in a ship determines which direction and how fast it will travel each turn.  Players fly across the board hunting for treasures and other player's ships to be the first one to reach 5 points or the last player with ships remaining.

—description from the designer

Cooperate and frantically search treasure of the Sleeping Dragon!
You are a group of adventurers, searching for objects hidden within the treasure of a golden dragon. Each round, players will need to work together to find the objects they need. The dragon's slumber is disturbed by every mistake you make or objects you forget! Loot the treasure for 3 rounds without waking him up, and you win the game! Be careful though, because if you make too many mistakes, the dragon will wake up... and he's always hungry after his nap!

Talassos is an ocean-adventure game. It takes inspiration from the game The Quest for El Dorado.

In Talassos players will try to reach a mysterious monolith on a very remote island. The player who reaches the Island first wins the game.

On the main ocean game board, players can travel horizontally or vertically. Each player has 1 submarine (unless playing 1 vs 1).

Movements are done by using movement points (mp). Each player throws dice to determine their movements points for that turn.

Horizontal movement costs 5mp
Vertical movement costs 1mp.

Player gets a depth mp bonus depending on which level vertical depth level they are traveling on.

boardgame: Der Clou: Roll & Heist – 3 Heists of Christmas
description:
Welcome to 3 heists of Christmas. This is a campaign for Clou - Roll & Heist! The basic idea behind the game, to spread some easily accessible gaming entertainment in Covid times, shall be continued with this campaign. On boardgame-racoon.de you can find more about the game including the basic scenarios and a link to the digital version. But now have fun with "3 heists of Christmas"!

Introduction:
Like the basic game, the campaign is designed for 1-3 players and includes a total of 3 new break-ins. These are connected to each other and your gang of thieves gains more experience with each break-in. You also have the opportunity to buy new tools and make special preparations.
In addition to the 3 burglaries and these rules, this download package also contains the following:

     an introduction and start story
     the campaign sheet, where you record your progress, so you can interrupt the game between 2 breakins.
     Once again all 4 thieves' sheets, which you do not need to print out again if you already have them.
     2 story sheets
     the basic rules, if you don't own them already


To play this campaign, you only need 3 six-sided dice and one pen per player in addition to this.
If you haven't played the basic game yet, it is recommended to read the rules for it at least once first.

The Buildings and Bombs expansion adds a whole new deck to Obliquity: The Trenches, the blueprint deck. This new deck consists of building and defence cards, to expand your trench and improve your operations.

Players can now utilize No Man's Land as they set up defences against their enemies. Racking up Attack Points, instead of Power Points, your defences directly repel your opponent's trench.

Buildings can be constructed in the trench, to house and protect cards as well as provide unique bonuses. Your trench will become a lot more colourful and powerful as you set up bunkers along the front row, and POW Camps in the back.

Four new special cards also enter the fray, providing devastating and unique effects if played. This expansion adds new dimension to the regular game, after one game, you'll never look back.

—description from the publisher

In the court of King Rattus, in the underground city of Cheesenobyl, players are nobles with specific skills, fighting to conquer the legendary Sword of Keijalho and thus become the Archduke: the supreme leader for the nuclear "vampirrate" invasion of the human world ! In five rounds, players must manage their nuke barrels to perform the best actions available and gather the largest army, in the best atmosphere of palace intrigue. The game features resource management control, player interaction and collection of the best cards to get more armies, accomplish missions and score more at the end of the game. Whoever assembles the largest army will rule the surface world in the name of King Rattus.

—description from the designer

In the town of Mon Khunkhao, where you live, things have started to change: the skies have turned gray, people have started to look sad.

You know that pollution is the cause, so you decide to join the Hugsa, a group of kids the same age as you, who are trying to make a difference. They go out at the end of each day to collect and recycle as much waste as they can before the people burn it at night.

But the kids at the Hugsa would like to test your commitment first: if you and your friends can collect waste and earn enough recycle hero badges, then you will be allowed to join the Hugsa and help clean up all of Mon Khunkhao.

Work together and gain 6 recycle hero badges before 6 terrain tiles are removed from the game because of pollution and you will win.

—description from the designer

In Faux Raccords, players try to cooperate editing a movie without being able to communicate. Several modes of play are available, in which you will edit a Feature Film, Two Short Films, a Series, a Multi-Arcs Movie or found your own Production Company.

On your turn, you will play a card from your hand in one of three different ways:

     placing a card face down in the Film
     placing a card face up in the Cut in order to use its power
     discarding a card in order to peek at a face down card in the Film.


Then you draw a new card and add it to your hand.

The game ends either when a player has no card to play on their turn, or when a player decides the movie is ready. The winning condition depends on the mode. For example, for the Feature Film, players need to obtain a row of 16 cards in ascending order.
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description:
Parallel universes are abundant in the world of Tapestry. The Fantasies & Futures expansion gives players the opportunity to build civilizations using fantasy and sci-fi inspired civs, technology, tapestries, and cities.

Components

In this third and final expansion to Tapestry, 10 new civilizations, 6 advanced capital city mats, 38 new tapestry cards, and 12 new tech cards are accompanied by a comprehensive rulebook that organizes all rules for Tapestry and the 3 expansions in one place (as well as a few replacement cards from previous expansions: 3 landmark cards, Oil Paint, and Migration). Some of the new tapestry cards include a new “charm” mechanism that provides one-time bonuses; some new tapestry and tech cards include exciting payoffs reserved for the final income turn.

Fantasies & Futures is fully compatible with any combination of the core game, the other Tapestry expansions, and the natural rubber playmat. It is packaged in an eco-friendly, recyclable envelope.

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
Berries is a set collection card game.  Players can either pick Berry cards from the patch or use their picked Berries to make Goods.  Each Good has its own game winning condition.  It’s up to each player to out-pick, out-make, and out-smart their rivals.

When it is a player’s turn, they first draw 1 card from the deck and add that card to their hand.  Then, they choose either Pick or Make.
​
Pick - When a player chooses Pick, they add any 2 cards from the Patch to their hand.

Then, each other player, in clockwise order, adds 1 card from the Patch to their hand.

Make - When a player chooses Make, beginning with the player whose turn it is, each player, in clockwise order, may use the required cards from their hand to make 1 Good that has not yet been made this turn -or– they may draw 2 cards from the deck.

When a player makes a Good, they might win the game immediately!

—description from the publisher

Easy Answers is a party game. This game will make you laugh, cry, sweat, and probably throw your marker across the room.

In Easy Answers, players are asked simple questions with simple answers, so anyone can play. The problem is, players may not want to write down the first thing that comes to mind, because more points are awarded for unique answers. Oh, and players also need to write their answers super fast to beat the competition. So just avoid the obvious answer and do it really fast. That’s Easy Answers.

One player acts as the player judge, asking the question and scoring the answers.  In each round, the judge changes.  The first player to 25 points wins.  Points are awarded for uniqueness and being the first (fastest) write an answer.

Example:
A card is flipped and reads “Something you watch.” Well “TV” of course. But wait… everyone’s going to write that. I’ll go with “movies”, but even that seems obvious. “People”? I watch people? A little creepy but I honestly do sometimes.  Ok, I need to decide.

boardgame: Kingdom Death: Monster – Cold Face Dagger Promo Card
description:
The Cold Face Dagger is a gear card that was included with the Hellebore - A Frozen Survivor miniature, which itself is not part of the game.

Cold Face Dagger (weapon, melee, dagger, ice, stone, melting 4) - If you are Insulated, your warm hands can better clutch the blade. This gains +1 speed.

The Tale of Ibyron
There, it stood amongst the flames of their enemies: their homes, their lives, their city. 
The only thing that the people of Ibyron could do was leave the village to burn under its new management. And so they did...
A voyage of what boats they could find that were not burned up by the intruders was the current plan, a plan that would bring the citizens of the once famed Ibyron City, back to a civilized society. But this time - this time, they would prepare for war as well. They would not be outmanuevered as they just were. Preparation of war must be on the agenda to save their new home from the unknown and known enemies. 
First things first. They had to get to work building up their new land to the glory it once stood for. Every citizen would have a job, and each would build on the skills of others to create a citizenship only heard of through a Bard's lyrical stylings on the side of a road, begging for some alms to make ends' meet.
This would be the fate of the new Ibyron.

Theme aside, this is a card game. The goal of the game is to construct all tier-3 building cards ( or trash them [solo game], removing them from the game). Each turn workers are able to be used as a resource,  depending which workcamp is organized (played sideways). Cards spent as workers can be drawn into the hand to be used as a workcamp or constructed as a building with abilities to help with constructing other buildings. 
As cards are discarded they go to the top of the deck if they are used as a worker.  Cards discarded as a workcamp are discarded to a discard pile. The game takes around an hour or less.

—description from the designer

Parley of Pirates is a pirate-themed game where the goal is to obtain the most booty (treasure). Players take turns playing different cards to either obtain booty or thwart other players' attempts. Play continues in rounds until all of the booty from the communal pile is exhausted. The player with the most booty at the end of the game is declared the winner.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: 国家予算人狼 (National Budget Werewolf)
description:
国家予算人狼 ("National Budget Werewolf") is a hidden identity trick taking game, a combination of mafia and older partnership trick takers like Napoleon with a few twists thrown in.

The theme of this game revolves around two teams: the prime minister team who is after the national budget (literally composed of predators) and the influential team that is trying stop them.
