The prime minister is decided by a bid at the beginning of the game, where players go around in circle, saying how much money of the national budget they think they can win. The highest bidder becomes the prime minister and decides what roles to give to each player.

The deck is composed of 3 suits of cards and suit-less money cards. It is a pseudo-may-follow trick taker, as while you must-follow the lead suit if you want to play a suited card, you can instead play a money card (regardless of if you can follow or not) which will go to the winner of the trick. These money cards also act as a lifeline, because if you ever cannot follow and are out of money cards, you are immediately exiled from the game (though you give your earned money to another player).

The 3 and 6 in each suit are also special cards, 3's causing the lowest played card to be the winner, and 6's cause the payout from the round to be doubled. When all the cards have been played, roles are revealed, money counted, and winner decided based on if the bid was met.

—user summary
publishers: 米光と抜群のゲームデザイナーズ (Yonemitsu to batsugun no gēmudezaināzu)

boardgame: Time Guardian Adventures: A World Without Chocolate
description:
Time Guardian Adventures - cooperative 3D puzzle adventures inspired by escape games. The new dimension of riddles and puzzles!
The eccentric criminal “Dr. Maxwell Mayhem" repeatedly manipulates the past to carry out his megalomaniac plans and change the present for his own benefit. It's up to you, the Time Guardians, to travel back in time to right Mayhem's evil deeds and restore the true course of history! The world is counting on you!
In this 3D adventure, Dr. Maxwell Mayhem went back in time and prevented the Maya from discovering chocolate over 3000 years ago! He stole their first cocoa tree, has claimed the precious beans for himself ever since and now hoards all the chocolate supplies in the world in his private vault.

—description from the publisher

The planet "Splitz" is in danger. The people who live there must evacuate as soon as possible. Several ships are ready to leave, but you will have to rely on the help of your opponents. Do they really want to help you?

Try to evacuate on the best ships and collect the most points to win.

Alien Panic is a family game with an original mechanic: you can't move your pawns, only those of the other players.

A chaotic course full of pitfalls to try to reach the end and accumulate the most points by avoiding or using the traps.

—description from the publisher

The players try to reach the cathedral with their 2 players. In doing so, they must cross bridges that are constantly collapsing and being rebuilt. On the event card fields you can get help, but sometimes obstacles are put in your way.

A fast paced 2-4 player game that is based on tic-tac-toe.

Every player has a pile of 24 cards. The one who gets rid of all cards first wins. The method of playing cards is simple: You take a look at the top card and then put it somewhere on the playing field. Be careful however you don't create three in a row of another player's symbol! When you do, all cards currently on the table become part of your drawing pile.

There are no turns. It's all about how fast you can put cards on the table without accidentally creating three of a row of another player, while trying to get three in a row of your symbol.

Although this can be played by 5-year-olds and 95-year-olds alike, it is best enjoyed by players of equal speed, although this can be remedied by giving the fastest player some piles from the slowest player.

—description from the publisher

-THE NEW FANTASTIC DRINKING GAME !-

Confront your friends during parties to become the great champion !

AIM OF THE GAME : To win at Drinking Heroes, you must be the player with the most of points when the game ends. You win points according to the Level of the monster you kill. Every turn, roll a dice to fight a monster. Depending on the result, you either kill the monster or have to drink sips.

FOR AN EVENING WITH OR WITHOUT ALCOHOL : It’s possible to play without drinking A player who doesn’t drink won’t have more than 2 trials max against all MONSTERS to kill them. He/She won’t be targeted by SPELL cards that distributes sips. If all the players don’t drink, take off all the SPELL cards that distributes sips.

—description from the publisher

Be creative and discover as many hidden words as possible in the images!

In this game, players must challenge themselves to find words and concepts in the displayed images, starting from a given category.

Whoever finds more words that the others have not found, adds points.

Repeated words between players are crossed out... so being original is a plus in this game (and in life),

La Gran Siete includes 100 cards. This game can save you from a boring dinner or raise a family gathering that is going to collapse, you just have to look at your card and yell RED...YELLOW...SHIT!

How is it played?

The cards are dealt equally among the number of players. You can't look at the cards. You have to leave them face down and in each turn, present the first of your deck in the center of the table.

Depending on the card you get, you will have to shout the color of the background, the text or an insult. If you yell anything, you get the deck in the center! The person who runs out of cards wins.

This game contains explicit language and can be offensive, we recommend not being so sensitive, relax and have fun bitching around.

Test your reflexes! You will be able to insult your friends and, at the same time, become smarter by working on your visual speed!

Surprise all your friends by imitating iconic moments in the best way!

In Caripelas you will have to imitate and try to guess other imitations of the funniest and most remembered memes. We can find some like "Bad luck Brian", "Ya wey!" and others of famous people caught at the right time.

With each hit, Martin Fierro chips will be distributed, in order to determine who wins the game when it ends.

Road to fame is not a bed of roses. It is rather a bed of thorns and bumps. At the end of the road there is success (or not). Whether you are a rock musician or jazz band member, you want to play in the largest concert halls. Take this journey - from your parents' garage to the World Tour and be the most successful band.

What is Roll and Rock?

In Roll and Rock players take control over their own music band. The bands gain experience, improve their skill and equipment, hire new staff members, record albums, and give concerts. All of this brings you fame points.

Roll and Rock is a roll & write game. Using dice, players perform actions in the locations available. The game lasts 6 rounds. Players receive points for the concerts and records they made.  The player with the most fame points after the last round is the winner.

A dynamic delivery game where you first build your city, filling it with buildings, roads, parks and depots.
Deliver secret items to secret locations.

BOARD SETUP:
Players first take turns building a town. Each time they play, a completely new town is created.
They use two-sided tiles to create a network of roads that connect to buildings, parks and depots.
Randomly scatter packages at parks.

GAME SETUP:
Players randomly select three delivery location cards, three item pickup cards and a truck. Place the truck on their numbered depot.

GAME PLAY OVERVIEW:
Players may:

     flip and/rotate one road tile
     add or remove a road block
     move their truck
     pick up an adjacent package
     drop off their package at adjacent delivery location


Upon delivering three items, the first player to return to their depot is the winner.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Twin Stars: Moonset – Scenario #3: Catch the Slayer
description:
A new episodic game that reimplements Twin Stars.

Each episode includes a Scenary postcard and 2 cards.

A few big updates from Twin Stars. A lot mostly in the visual side. It uses cubes, and it uses them on the card instead of using the edges of the card for tracking. Characters have skills, store items and other things on their cards. You can also gain Hide or Hunt. With Hide, you can re-roll an alert die (which is an extra die, not a die on an alert symbol), and Hunt allows you to try for an extra star.


Scenario: Catch the Slayer

An aristocratic named Peire reaches out in dire need of help. There has bee a string of deaths in Pahyrstm and every Friday morning a body has been found. The killer's identity is known, but they leave a note next to each body. At first the notes were vague, but they've slowly started to paint a picture. The evidence is showing thatyou have been the killers all along. Capture the killer before more victims are killed, and before you are blamed for the death.

Characters:

     Rallyed Thilve
     Nereayne

A Goblin Lanes 2-card expansion for Squabblin Goblins.


Goblin tunnels can be surprisingly straightforward. Easier to get home from a raid without twist and turns.

2 Lane cards (Loot Bag, Stone Lamp).

A Lane is a vertical path from one player to another. To play a Lane card, place it face-up in front of a pile (rather than on or under it).

If a card is played to any pile on the same side as a Lane card, the Lane card is moved to the opposite end of the Lane.

At the end of the game, the Lane cards will score points based on the Pile they are in front of.

This is the first expansion of Glow, allowing more players to be added to the game.

New adventurers with their new powers and new companions will be available. 3 sets of cards will also allow players to dispel the darkness with 3 different types of new companions.

boardgame: KISS Tour: The Board Game That Rocks
description:
Go on tour with your favorite rock band, KISS!  Help The Demon, The Spaceman, The Starchild, and the Catman, as they travel across the USA.

Put on the best shows, collect tons of cash, and bring Rock and mayhem everywhere you go.  First player to hold a concert in each city on this cross-country tour wins!

Will you become a Rock Legend?

—description from publisher

The Department of Antiquities has uncovered evidence of a series of lost tombs. They have invited you, the world’s leading archaeologists, to help find the lost tombs and recover their treasures.

Each day the Minister of Antiquities will announce one new dig permit, and the first expedition to find a viable route is allowed to travel and dig. Race against competing archaeological expeditions across desert sands, through jungle oases and across rivers to find the tombs. But beware of scorpions, raiders and sandstorms along the way!

Players roll 2 dice to add their first camp to the board.  Pick a Minister card which dictates the route a player must travel this turn.  Players race to find a path - avoiding obstacles or using travel cards to overcome them.  Once a player finds a path, they yell "Carpe Diem!" and move to their new camp and picking up a Dig card which provides a new item or event. If a player arrives at a tomb, they collect the tomb instead and roll the dice to place a new tomb.

The game ends when all tombs are discovered or an expedition runs out of dig camps - whichever occurs first. Either way, the player with the most points wins the game!

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

boardgame: Magic: The Gathering – Challenger Deck: Dimir Control
description:
Challenger Decks 2022 are a set of preconstructed decks designed for tabletop players that wish to start competitive tournament play right out of the box for the Standard format. Released on April 1, 2022, there are four decks in total, containing a 60-card main deck, a 15-card sideboard, as well their associated tokens.

Dimir Control contains 2 mythic, 23 rare, 17 uncommon, and 18 common cards.

boardgame: Magic: The Gathering – Challenger Deck: Gruul Stompy
description:
Challenger Decks 2022 are a set of preconstructed decks designed for tabletop players that wish to start competitive tournament play right out of the box for the Standard format. Released on April 1, 2022, there are four decks in total, containing a 60-card main deck, a 15-card sideboard, as well their associated tokens.

Gruul Stompy contains 1 mythic, 26 rare, 7 uncommon, and 26 common cards.

Expand your copy of Rolling Realms with this set of 6 promo cards inspired by Expeditions!* To play this realm, use dice to travel to hexes you haven’t discovered yet, and gain their benefits. To complete this realm, you must visit all hexes with a star.

*Yes, the name of the realm is indeed "Expedition," but the name of the game is "Expeditions". We had already printed the promo pack prior to entering production on the Expeditions game, which was named Expedition until very late in the process when another game was released under that name, prompting the pluralization for the final name.

—description from the publisher

The Quest Kids: Giant Adventure is a LIFE-SIZED fantasy game experience for kids.

Using 36 giant cardboard tiles players will create a dungeon in their own home and act as the game pieces as they search for treasure, silly bad guys and stars.

Giant Adventure features the same award-winning mechanics as The Quest Kids board game, but in a new one-of-a-kind immersive experience.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Ill Met in Flanders: The Battle of Fleurus, August 29, 1622
description:
The battle of Fleurus was fought during the so-called Bohemian phase of the Thirty Years War, but the battle occurred in the Flanders, fought between a Catholic Spanish army under the command of Gonzalo de Cordoba and a Protestant Protestant army led by mercenary leaders Mansfeld and Christian of Brunswick. The battle of Fleurus was initiated by a call from the Protestant Dutch to relieve the city of Breda, then under siege by another Spanish army under the command of Ambrogio Spinola. The aim of the Protestant troops was to cut off the retreat and trap the Spaniards, not just to end the siege.

The Protestant army encountered their opponents near Fleurus, and a furious battle ensued, where the better led (even if weaker) Spanish army was able to crush their Protestant enemy and provide a means of retreat for Spinola’s force.

Each combat unit represents from 300 to 1000 soldiers, and it is rated, from left to right, for combat factor, morale factor and movement factor. Each infantry strength point is around 150 men, each cavalry strength point around 60 men. Each leader is rated for Command (indicating how many activation chits that leader has) and Movement. Each hex is about 100 meters. Each turn represents a half hour of time.

Players draw leader markers from an opaque container (mug, envelope) to activate their leaders' formations. Units move about a hex map of the battlefield and use a six-sided die to resolve combat.

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
A set of two expansions that were given out during the Kickstarter campaign for Motor City.

—user summary

The Certicates Expansion introduces unique new certifications that replace those on the scoresheets. Each player gets a unique set of
certifications! All normal rules for unlocking certifications still apply. The unique effects of the new certifications are explained below.

The Bobs Expansion asks the important question: What would you say you do here? It offers unique new bonuses — subject to the whims of the auditor!

When the auditor die is rolled, place it on the space that matches the rolled symbol. The two bonuses adjacent to that space are available for the following round. If a player triggers either of the available bonuses during their turn, they may place their key token on the matching space and gain it once. Each player may only gain one of the two bonuses per round. Return all key tokens to players at the end of each round.

—description from the designer

boardgame: Black Pearl in a Crystalline Shell
description:
Black Pearl in a Crystalline Shell is a print and play, roll and write game you can play with 1-4 players set in the old days of pirates and treasure islands. Explore the island of Saturnia and find the Black Pearl!

Choose a pirate character (each with different abilities), one of the three game maps and create your own custom treasure map. Roll your dice and take actions such as collecting gems and coins, digging up treasure and moving around the map to discover the spot of the Black Pearl. Be the first to escape the treasure island Saturnia with it.

—description from the designer

Cryptic is a card-based table-top RPG that takes up to 6 heroes across a new world plagued with the undead.

It is up to six worthy heroes to slice and dice their way through Inferis, vanquishing monsters, ridding the world of evil whilst levelling up, collecting unique loot, and crafting useful items.

Be warned through, The Legion is the least of your concern.

Grab a shield, sharpen your blade, and drink those potions! You've got a whole world full of adventure ahead of you.

The Isle of Inferis awaits.

—description from the designer

boardgame: Five Parsecs from Home: Freelancer's Handbook
description:
Welcome, Freelancer!
As Unity extends its reach, diplomatic treaties allow for easy travel by members of minor alien polities. Across the galaxy, Krag and Skulker recruits join the already cosmopolitan galactic community. Krag and Skulker crews provide freelancer crew captains new options while undertaking salvage operations and other high-risk business.

Additionally, we are happy to report that, after persistent lobbying, Unity regulators are now allowing trained psionics to perform freelance work. Interested captains should fill out forms B343, B-F343, and A42 (supplemental) to begin the application process.

The Freelancer’s Handbook is the second expansion for the RPG-Lite adventure wargame Five Parsecs From Home 3rd edition and gives you 66 pages packed full of new options focusing on adding new characters to your crew, and on new types of adventures in Fringe space.

This digital release also includes several comprehensive rules systems that offer new and expanded ways to play. A No-Minis Combat Resolution system allows you to resolve a battle without the use of miniatures. We’ve also built on elements from the core rulebook such as more detailed mission generation and quest progression, as well as expanding the Connections rule to allow more elaborate stories to unfold.

This 66-page PDF-only expansion includes:

Character Options:

Meet two new crew species - the Skulkers and the Krag - and discover how to integrate psionics into your campaign.
New Kit - psionics, new Bot upgrades, new ship parts, and new training options.
Game Options:

No-Minis Combat Resolution - Play Five Parsecs without miniatures or a map.
Expanded Ways to Play - Expanded missions, expanded quest progression, and expanded connections.
Dramatic combat - New combat and weapon tweaks to make your firefights more exciting and action packed.
Scenarios & Settings:

Fringe World Strife - Add chaos and unpredictability to the worlds of the Fringe.
Loans: Who Do You Owe? - Expanded detail for your ship loans.
Salvage Jobs - A new type of mission that lets you explore a site full of unknown riches… and dangers.
This is the second expansion for the RPG-lite Five Parsecs From Home solo adventure wargame. Assemble a ragtag crew of galactic trailblazers and head out to explore the stars, pick up jobs, and every now and then —  engage in some action-packed, sci-fi combat!

—description from the designer

Love Letter: 10th anniversary edition combines all the different versions of the classic micro game Love Letter.

It does that by re-theming all the versions to the original Love Letter theme so they fit together. So you're still trying to get a love letter to your beloved princess.

It's still the classic and simple 'have one card in your hand, take a card, play a card' gameplay with the last person or highest card winning. But it adds alternative cards, character cards, score cards, quest cards, alternative win conditions, and more. And it offers 16 different variants to combine the cards.
family: Versions & Editions: Big Box Versions of Individual Games
Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: Snow White

description: A cooperative storytelling game that plays like Uno, where players build a story by adding elements from the cards in their hand. They can pick story elements such as characters, settings, action and motivations from themes such as Science Fiction, Romance, Horror, and Detective/Noir. The cards allow players as young as 8 to participate and build their confidence in telling stories, while everyone gets to laugh in the absurdity of their creation.

The silent facility has become a deadly, inhospitable fortress. You are a warrior on a mission to destroy the evil mafia, and you are alone in this fortress. The enemies are huge, but the more you defeat their members, the more vulnerable the security becomes and the fewer obstacles you will face that will prevent you from taking a bite out of the boss.

In the game Greeen Mafia, you will enjoy the exhilaration of defeating enemy after enemy with your enhanced body. However, whether or not a facility can be damaged by defeating the enemy depends on the damage inflicted on the facility beforehand. Furthermore, the damage inflicted on facilities is gradually removed, defeated enemies will eventually be replenished, loopholes will be blocked, and destroyed facilities will be repaired. You can control the movements of your enemies to some extent by devising the order in which you defeat them. Conversely, you need to remember which enemies you have defeated and when; otherwise you will not be able to take advantage of the game.

Once you have inflicted the default damage to the facility, defeated the gatekeepers waiting for you on the way, and overcome the final objective — the boss — you have completed your mission and won the game.

—description from the designer

Clear out the living room or head outside, because you're about to show your friends a whole new kind of card game! Become King of the Ring by dodging, ducking, and landing 'punches' and throwing the squishy boxing glove at your opponents. No mercy!

Objective: Capture the most cards and earn the most points by knocking out fellow "boxers" and betting on other players' showdowns!

boardgame: Beyond the Empire: Wargames Rules for Engagements with Small Forces in the Back of Beyond and Other Places 1918 to 1939
description: Mad Barons, Chinese Warlords, Revolutionary hordes, Archaic Imperialists and Fascist interventionists- your choice is endless. Skirmish rules for any Interwar theatre, but especially the madness that is the Back of Beyond. 5-6 units a side plus armoured cars etc if you fancy. Inc 6 Scenarios.
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

boardgame: Оранж Квест: Атака Роботов (Orange Quest: Robot Attack)
description: It so happened that there are no former candy thieves. Joe took up the old one again, but decided to cover the tracks properly. And this means that 8 new areas are waiting for the players. Intuition tells us that the main villain must be hiding in a candy factory. However, there is still a depot, a ship and a crow's nest, where you can quietly peck at candy. Although it is possible that Joe hid in the observatory. He sits to himself, pops sweets all day and looks at the stars, thinking about how they look like lollipops. And in general, who knows him. These thugs are so unpredictable. Will Joe suddenly want to spend the rest of his life in a cabin in the woods weaving looted candy and singing heartwarming songs about an old maple tree?

boardgame: Dig Your Way Out: Dig In Expansion
description:
Dig In is an expansion for DYWO that introduces the prison warden and 7 new places. Bringing many novel options and strategies to the table, this expansion pushes DYWO’s already great replayability to its limits!

As its beautiful cover hints at, Dig In contains the prison Warden. This non-playable character walks around the board and sends bad-mannered inmates to solitary confinement. On the other hand, you can go to her office and bribe her in advance with cigarettes so she can help you get an edge over other inmates later.

This expansion also offers 6 new places that can be used as alternatives to existing places on the board. They change the actions available in each place and add many more options to dig your way out. Each of these new places is optional and independent from one another, allowing you to build a different and unique prison layout, every time you play.

In the Library you can rehabilitate yourself to get a new Background as well as get smart enough to spy on the hands of other players.

In the Gambling cells you can gamble using cigarettes but you can also plan (on toilet paper!) your next moves in advance.

In the Laundry joining a gang becomes easier and you can also get bandages to craft or heal yourself later.

In the Workshop you can hone your digging skills or upgrade the Tools that you already have.

In the Gym you can work out to be prepared for future fights, or even start a brawl with every player in the place!

Finally, if you send prisoners to the Psychiatric ward, they will get psychological Trauma that will hinder their actions, until they can heal it.

—description from the publisher

Night at the Ossuary is an 18 card, 2 player trick-taking game that implements some unique mechanisms and takes roughly 15 minutes to play.
You are archaeologists exploring the depths of a newly discovered ossuary, attempting to find the most valuable artifacts inside.

Players play out four hands in an attempt to score the most points to win the game.
In each game players will want to consider leveraging some of the unique mechanisms in this game:

     Playing multiple cards to a trick
     Emptying your hand first to score all the remaining cards in your opponent's hand
     Take zero tricks to score all the points your opponent would have scored this hand
     Pressing your luck based on the two unknown cards that weren't dealt this hand


—description from the designer

The Maltese forces were fighting a losing battle in the Siege of Malta, beset by monsters on all sides. Only the timely intervention of a true miracle saved them from total annihilation. Now the Vatican have rescued the beleaguered defenders and brought them to the relative safety of Venice. Here they put their hard fought experience to good use, fighting for the glory of God.

This box provides some divine reinforcements for your Vatican gang. The Angel of the Blooded Rose is a frontline fighter and an inspiring presence to those that fight alongside her. A Burning Saint provides area denial with full plate and a fiery aura and is quite a capable combatant in their own right. A Baptist provides support for his gang, commanding blessed water to provide safe passage for allies and danger to his enemies. Two Chevalresses protect their allies and with sword and shield put down any that would see them harmed.

Contains 5 resin miniatures and 5 plastic bases.

Hen House is a climbing/shedding card game in which players attempt to get rid of all the cards in their hands.

Cards come in four suits: white eggs, white chickens, brown eggs, and brown chickens. Chickens can be combined with chickens, eggs can be combined with Eggs, white cards can be combined with white cards, and brown cards can be combined with brown cards. To shed cards, you can use animals that can help, like snakes that can eat eggs and foxes that can eat chickens.

The player who plays all of their cards first wins.

—description from the publisher

Following a tragic Super Hero operation that resulted in many casualties, the Superhuman Registration Act was ratified, forcing heroes to reveal their secret identities and subject themselves to government oversight. Iron Man agreed with the policy and gathered a team of Pro-Registration heroes around him to enforce it. Captain America, on the other hand, felt heroes needed to be above direct government control. Other Anti-Registration heroes joined him, becoming outlaws and forming the Secret Avengers. Inevitably a violent conflict broke out between the two sides and now the villains sit by the sidelines as once-allied heroes clash against each other in an all-out Civil War!

This expansion brings an entirely new way of playing Marvel United! The Civil War play modes make it a true Player vs Player game, in which two teams of Heroes clash against each other, with no Villain in sight. Featuring a roster of Heroes from both sides of the Registration conflict, this expansion brings two ways for players to fight each other: either the more casual Clash of Heroes, or the more competitive, asymmetrical, and thematic Registration Clash! Which team will you choose?

boardgame: G.I. JOE Deck-Building Game: New Alliances – A Transformers Crossover Expansion
description:
Earth is thrust into danger when a new menace arrives in the form of giant robots capable of hiding in plain sight! Of course Cobra is involved, but this time they aren't the biggest problem–not by a long shot. If the Joes are going to have a chance to save the planet, they’ll need equally big allies to face this new threat!

In this special Transformers crossover expansion, the Joes will roll out with new Autobot friends like Bumblebee and Optimus Prime as they take on the evil Decepticons and their sinister Cobra cronies, led by Old Snake!

Features:

     G.I. JOE teams up with the Autobots!
     A new crossover Mission with Space Bridge tile!
     New Autobot cards to recruit as allies! They can go on missions in their bot mode without requiring transport, OR in their alt vehicle mode where they'll be able to haul members of the JOE team along.
     New Ark component and Energon dice pool that must be managed to fuel Autobot skills and tech.
     Constructicons make cards more expensive to recruit, and if 6 are ever in play simultaneously, you'll have to take on the mighty Devastator!
     And more!


—description from the publisher

The shape shifting Skrulls always had eyes on Earth. Their previous conquest attempts failed, but now they hatched a more insidious plan: a Secret Invasion. Skrulls disguised as super heroes implanted themselves into almost every team. Nick Fury Sr. and his trusty S.H.I.E.L.D. team have their work cut out for them to sort out friend from foe and foil the plans of the Skrull queen. Who can you trust?

This expansion brings the insidious conflict between the Skrull invaders and the forces of S.H.I.E.L.D., aided by what Heroes Nick Fury can still trust. Face Veranke, the Skrull Queen, or take on a whole squadron of shape shifting Skrull Soldiers. To help them in their struggle, Heroes can go to Camp Hammond, where they can receive Advanced Training that just might give them the edge they need to stop the invasion.

boardgame: G.I. JOE Mission Critical: Chaos Break
description:
Chaos has arrived! The Dreadnoks, led by Cobra agent Zartan, are an outlaw biker gang devoted to spreading anarchy and panic before quietly slipping away. Zartan’s lieutenants, Zarana and Road Pig, are masters at sowing destruction - they will be formidable foes to bring to justice!

Thankfully, G.I. Joe has called in reinforcements! The elite ranger Beach Head and the expert paratrooper Ripcord have been deployed to stop Zartan before he leaves the world in ruins.

Features:

     Play as new Heroes – Beach Head and Ripcord! 
     Introduces a new boss – Zartan!
     2 new lieutenants – Zarana & Road Pig
     2 new vehicles!


—description from the publisher

boardgame: G.I. JOE Mission Critical: Sgt Slaughter Figure Pack
description:
Sgt Slaughter, reporting for duty! The famous Drill Sergeant is ready to slam Cobra into the ground and make your squad the best it can be!

Features:

     Special Hero Figure expansion! 
     Add Sgt Slaughter’s signature vehicle, the Triple T, to your team’s arsenal!
     Unique combat cards to help drive Cobra into submission or whip your team into fine fighting force!


—description from the publisher

boardgame: Reavers of Midgard: Gods and Prophets
description:
In Reavers of Midgard: Gods and Prophets you will encounter new obstacles and new opportunities in your quest for glory.

The gods themselves have taken notice of your exploits and will offer their aid to those willing to celebrate them with offerings of riches.

Meanwhile, a wandering prophet wanders the world offering prophecies to those she meets and a devastating Maelstrom makes treacherous seas nearly impassable.

Reavers of Midgard: Gods and Prophets expands on the base game, offering up more treasures, more spoils, and a brand new Celebrate the Gods Board where players can petition the Gods themselves to join them in their voyages, giving them great power in that God's area of expertise. But that's not all! The Valkyries themselves will join you in your battles, and the Fates of the Norns will aid you in your prophecies.

Will you navigate these new challenges in a way worthy of timeless tales? Or will your rivals earn their place before you in the Halls of Valhalla?

-description from publisher

Genetically mutated by the Terrigen Mist, the Inhumans are an offshoot of humanity, gifted with extraordinary abilities. As their king, Black Bolt, sought to unite the Inhumans and the Kree to bring peace and stability to their races, Emperor Vulcan of the Shi’ar Empire launched a treacherous assault, led by Gladiator, Praetor of the Imperial Guard, igniting an all-out war with the Inhuman royal family. It is up to the Inhumans to come together and put an end to the War of Kings before it ravages the galaxy!

This expansion brings the Inhumans into the fold of Marvel United! This royal group of Super Heroes will need to use the mutagenic properties of Terrigen Mist to its full potential in order to stop the onslaught of Emperor Vulcan and his Imperial Guard, led by the conflicted Gladiator.

boardgame: My Little Pony: Adventures in Equestria Deck-Building Game – Princess Pageantry Expansion
description:
Let’s give a royal welcome! Celestia, Luna, Cadence, and Shining Armor join the roster of playable characters in My Little Pony - Adventures in Equestria. These characters will bring new mechanics and abilities befitting of their status to the game, along with new locations and challenges to overcome.

Features:

     Play as Princess Celestia, Princess Luna, Princess Cadance, or the heroic Shining Armor!
     Use Princess Power! Princesses Celestia and Luna can trigger additional abilities!
     Power couple Princess Cadance and Shining Armor have extra starting cards that work on each other's turns!
     Attend Festivals using card Traits to earn useful gifts!


—description from the publisher

boardgame: Marvel United: X-Men – The Age of Apocalypse
description:
The death of Professor X in a freak time-travel accident resulted in a reality in which the world is ruled by the mutant despot Apocalypse. But not all mutants agree with Apocalypse’s rule, including a group of ragtag freedom fighters led by Xavier’s oldest friend, Magneto. Only united can the Amazing X-Men put an end to the Age of Apocalypse!

This expansion brings a whole new take on the X-Men. In a world ruled by Apocalypse and his cohorts, heroes like Beast have gone villainous, while villains like Magneto and Sabretooth form the heroic resistance, joined by new X-Men Heroes. The Age of Apocalypse brings complex new challenges and unorthodox Heroes battling in an apocalyptic setting.

—description from the publisher

Crossing over from the Negative Zone came the Annihilation Wave, a vast army commanded by Annihilus, bent on conquering the positive matter universe. Trying to hold off the invasion, the Nova Corps was destroyed, with Richard Rider remaining as the only surviving Nova. Rescued by Quasar and aided by Moondragon and Phyla-Vell, these cosmic champions must stand united against the Annihilation Wave!

This expansion brings a deadly cosmic conflict to Marvel United. Annihilus launches his forces against our universe and a powerful band of galactic Heroes must stand against his onslaught. A tough battle can get even harder with the addition of the Complication Challenge introduced by this expansion, as well as the relentless Harvester of Sorrow Location.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Power Rangers Deck-Building Game: S.P.D. To The Rescue Expansion
description:
This expansion has everything you need to join or oppose the galactic police force of the future! The leader of the Troobian Empire, Emperor Gruumm, is threatening to make Earth his next conquest, using the former A-Squad Rangers of Space Patrol Delta to carry out his nefarious plans. The B-Squad Rangers, led by Commander "Doggie" Cruger, are Earth's last line of defense.

Features:

     Containment is a new way to win! Work as S.P.D. Rangers to round up Emperor Gruumm’s minions that are threatening Earth and place them in containment!
     The A-Squad Rangers are a unique type of Villain that attach to the Omni/The Magnificence, an ancient villain Gruumm is trying to build a body for!
     Introduces Stackable Cards!
    New Basic cards – DeltaMax Strikers for the Heroes and Troobian Swords for the Villains!


—description from the publisher

boardgame: Power Rangers: Heroes of the Grid – Ranger Allies Pack #3
description:
This expansion introduces five new playable characters! Many universes are connected by the Morphin Grid, and these five heroes are paragons of knowledge and skill.

Enter battle as Udonna, the Mystic Force White Ranger, with her mastery of ice-cold magic; Delphine, the swift and skillful leader of the Alien Rangers of Aquitar; Kendall Morgan, a brilliant scientist and the Dino Charge Purple Ranger; and Karone, the Galaxy Pink Ranger, formerly the villain Astronema, who comes armed with the Lights of Orion.

At the head of this group of Rangers is none other than Doctor K, the creator of the Ranger Operator Series and the lead scientist at the domed city of Corinth. Together, these heroes fight to save the Morphin Grid!

—description from the publisher
family: Game: Power Rangers: Heroes of the Grid

boardgame: Power Rangers: Heroes of the Grid – Shadow of Venjix Theme Pack
description:
Venjix is here! This sentient virus, and his lieutenant Tenaya 7, laid waste to Corinth before his eventual defeat… or so we thought. For a time he lay dormant, before rising once more as Evox, a powerful Avatar entity who threatened the world of the Beast Morphers Rangers — including newcomers Nate Silva and Steel!

—description from the publisher
family: Game: Power Rangers: Heroes of the Grid

boardgame: Vampire: The Masquerade – Rivals: Justice & Mercy
description:
Justice & Mercy is an expansion for Vampire: The Masquerade - Rivals that adds two new clans, each on a different path:  BANU HAQIM & SALUBRI. The Banu Haqim are judges and lawbringers with both martial and sorcerous tools at their disposal. The Salubri are a clan on the run, simply trying to survive – alone if necessary. Rarest of all the clans, their mending abilities are second to none. You may play these two clans head-to-head or integrate them with your other clans to create new strategies!

—description from the publisher

Players are contestants on a barbecue cooking reality show. Assign your assistants to various work stations to prepare the best feast by the end of four rounds.

A worker placement game with dice for workers. You roll your dice at the beginning of each round, and most worker placement spaces let you manipulate the values of your unplaced dice. You need to tune your workers correctly to perfectly cook your meat.

Score points for perfectly cooked meat and special sets of dishes at the end of the game.
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
Players are disciples at a monastery on Mt. Kunlun. The holy tree is blooming, and you need to collect its seeds and present them to the old masters of the monastery and the divine beasts.

Players have a hand of five movement cards, and spend one each round to move a shared pawn between the six magic sites and collect seed cards. Each player and each site also has a master card, and players can spend the matching seed cards at a master to score points. Movement cards are not recycled, so the game ends after five rounds.

Many faces, one purpose - Unity, the oppressive authority you have fled, have followed you to Andromeda's Edge. Nine Unity leaders, ranging in difficulty and tactics, will face off against your sole faction in solo mode. Or increase the risk in a multiplayer game by adding Unity into the mix.

The Escalation expansion provides pieces for a 5th player, 3 new factions (Darkstar Acolytes, Nebulon Cloudpeople and Krawln), a new raider (The Void Drake), the Shadows of the Void event deck, a new special region known as the Nethervoid, Relic modules, Ancient moons, 4 new ship upgrade tiles and a robust solo mode that can be played in 1-3 player games.

—description from the publisher

Hametsu is a solo / co-op (1-4) monster hunting game set in post-apocalyptic feudal Japan. You take on the role of Hunters, warriors trained to fight back against a tide of Oni demons and mythical creatures let loose by The Cataclysm.

Each game of Hametsu sees the Hunters seeking out a mythical beast known as a Boss, and attempting to take it down. At the beginning of the game, the Hunters will be in stealth and wandering Oni will not be aware of their presence. Once the alarm has been raised, the Oni will pursue and target the Hunters until the Boss is found. Then it's up to the Hunters to be the last ones standing.

Hametsu uses standard d6’s for performing tests and saves. Hunters all have stats that govern how many d6 are rolled to perform certain actions. A roll of 4+ is a success. Score enough of those, and you will cast a spell, deal damage, or shrug off a hit.

Carve Your Own Path

Create a Hunter and choose from nine different classes spread among three different schools, all with unique abilities, spells, and playstyles. As you level up, choose new abilities and stats based on your class specific Path of Legend.

Narrative campaign

Hametsu encourages players to track progress from game to game, growing their Hunters and expanding their narrative story. Designed from the ground up for campaign play, dive in to randomly generated scenarios, or fight through the first narrative campaign, The Wolf and the Devil.

Welcome to Old Mage, the Spell Blasting Adventure game of Arcane Domination!

Explore ancient ruins, battle fierce monsters, invoke mighty spells and unleash powerful relics as you compete for the High Wizard’s throne. Terrible monsters and treacherous hazards await - yet none quite so terrible, nor so treacherous - as your arcane rivals!

Claim victory in one of two ways: Find the Master Orb and deliver it to a Mage Tower across the Great River ... or Destroy your foes with spell, steel and guile! But beware, Old Mages do not die quietly; they become Haunts that plague the living, or return as Undead Liches!

Is your sorcery strong enough, Old Mage?

—description from the publisher

Stranger Tales is a role-playing game (RPG) and Board Game in which we will play the role of kids who will have to face the “Evil”. We are in the 1980s, an era that you probably experienced directly or indirectly through films, music, board games, videogames and everything that that unique and unrepeatable decade has left thanks to the echo of a time near and far. Did you know that the 80s were full of monsters and creatures of all kinds? If your answer is no, you probably did not directly experience that era or you have been told that it was just rumors; but if you lived it, if you were a child or a kid during those years, you know what I'm talking about. Monsters existed and walked around on their own legs. Of course, adults would never have believed you, but I can guarantee you that at that time Evil had eyes and legs, mouths and teeth.

The peculiarity of Stranger Tales is that you will have everything ready in one box: Just take it with you to experience fantastic adventures and you won't need anything else! Everything is in the box. Stranger Tales is also a mammoth work on ’80s and ’90s Pop Culture. In fact, in the definitive manual, you will find not only the rules to play but also contents that will help you identify yourself again—or for the first time—in a world so near and far.

The Fusion System that was born in Tales of Evil and continued in Boogeyman here evolves to the highest levels. It will only be your imagination and what you find in the stories that set the limits; but in reality, there is no limit whatsoever. You will be able to integrate into the game any action or behavior you wish in order to help your Investigators during your adventure. You may even be able to foresee that some Tests could take place outside of the usual game session, such as challenging players with special tasks to complete “side quests” in their real life.  For example, nothing prevents you from requesting a certain type of flower or object be brought the next time you get together to play, or performing real actions such as going to a place and hiding something there and then asking the other players to find the object that you have hidden before your next game session. As you can see, the limits to what you can create with the Fusion System are practically infinite. Don't like the Fusion System? Don't love taking actions in your real life to directly influence the game? No problem. In agreement with the other players, you can safely decide not to use the Fusion System for your games. The beauty of Stranger Tales is precisely this—that is to say, being able to adapt the game to your liking and in your image and likeness. Again, there is no limit.

—description from the publisher

That game aims to arouse children's curiosity about the history of İstanbul, where they live or visit, and encourage them to research and learn. There are 60 questions in total in the game consisting of 30 cards.

How to play?

     All cards are shuffled
     The youngest player answers first. The player to her/his left draws the top card and asks one of the questions on the card.
     If the player answers true he/she takes the card. If the answer is false, the card is put below the deck. The game continues clockwise.
     If a player takes 4 cards of the same type, that player is the winner.


Short Game:

     If a player takes 4 cards of any type, that player is the winner.


Long Game:

     If a player takes all cards of the same type, that player is the winner.


—user summary

Welcome to Pairadice City, where the ground is overflowing with treasure ready to be found. You're racing to be the first to uncover as many treasures as possible all while avoiding any perils and dealing with the antics of your fellow miners!

Will you sell treasures you've found to fund future expeditions and stall your race to the finish?  Or will you keep them, push on deeper into the mines and risk losing it all to secure your victory?

—description from the designer

The object of the game is not to take cards. Horseshoes on each card you take will give you negative points. The winner of the game is the one who collects the fewest horseshoes at the end of the game.

Setup:


     Each player takes 10 cards from the deck
     Take 4 cards from the deck and place them under each other on the table.


How to play:


     Players place a card from their hand face down in front of them.
     After the last player has laid his/her card, all the cards are revealed simultaneously.
     Players place their cards according to the rules


Rules:


     Card which has a lower number first plays: The order of play is from the player with the lowest card to the player with the biggest card.
     Increasing Numbers: The cards must appear in ascending order in the row on the floor.
     Smallest difference: Each card must be played where the most minor difference is.
     The row which has been full: If there are 4 cards in a row that row is called as full. If a player must play a card to here that player takes all cards in that row and his/her card becomes the first card for that row.
     Choose what you want: If a player's card doesn't match with any of the rows that player takes any one of the rows and her/his card becomes the first card for that row.


—user summary

If you have a retail edition of Canvas: Reflections, purchase this to upgrade it to the Deluxe edition

Comes with:
- 10 More Reversible Cards
- 5 Signature Style Cards
- 2 Ribbon Pins
- 16 Wood Gold Ribbons
- 10 Wood Inspiration Tokens

Sticky 10 is a fun card game that can be played with 2-8 players.

Players will try different strategies to win the game while trying to get rid of Sticky 10 cards that cannot be played.

Setup


    Players pick one random card from color cards. All players take one Sticky 10 card to their hand. Keep remaining Sticky 10 cards out of the game


For 2 players game, add 2 extra Sticky 10 card into the deck and mix it

For 3 players game, add 1 extra Sticky 10 card into the deck and mix it


     There are 4 Terminator cards in the game. But, in the games played up to with 4 players, only 2 Terminator cards are added into the deck whereas 4 Terminator cards are added into the deck in the games 5-8 players. Keep remaining Terminator cards out of the game
     All players are distributed 9 cards. Thus players shall have 10 cards at the beginning of the game, including Sticky 10 card.
     The deck is put on the table face down. A card is opened from the top. The game begins!


Note: If the card opened from the top is a Special card or Sticky 10 card, players may begin to play by throwing any card with any color to the table.

How to play?


     The youngest player begins to play first and the sequence continues by counter clock wise. Each player can play only one card on their turn.
     Each player can play only one card on their turn.
     The player who shall begin to play, plays according to the open card on the table.


For instance: There is "red 2" card on the table. The player who should play can do one of the following moves;


    Plays with any red; it is going to be the next player's turn to play. In such a case, color shall be deemed to have remained same.



     Plays any card which matches with any number and color on the table; he/she gives to the next player any two cards from his/her hand and it is going to be next player's turn to play. In such a case, color shall be deemed to have remained same.


• Plays any card which matches with the number on the table; he/she gives to the next player any one card from his/her hand and it is going to be next player's turn to play. In such a case, color shall be deemed to have changed. Next player should throw a card according to the new color. You can also throw different color but same number or Special card.

• Plays any Special cards; card's feature shall be active and it is either going to be the next player's turn to play according to the card thrown, or not. In such a case, the player who should play shall determine the color by the card he is going to throw.

Note: If you can not throw any card, draw a new card from deck. If you still can not throw any card, your turn ends.

The player who removed his cards first from his hand shall be deemed to have won.

boardgame: Railroad Ink Challenge: Ultimate Collector's Edition
description:
The Railroad Ink Challenge – Ultimate Collector’s Edition is finally here! With both Classic and Challenge Core games, expansions, and additional materials it has really everything you need and may desire to reach networking nirvana!

—description from the publisher
family: Versions & Editions: Big Box Versions of Individual Games

description:
Answer the questions with pleasure, and do not stay away from the movies in the environment!

How to play:


     All cards are shuffled.
     Players answer the questions in 90 seconds.
     Easy cards are 3 points, medium-difficulty cards are 6 points and hard cards are 9 points. Players need to answer both questions on the cards correctly to get points
     After 90 seconds who the most points collects wins

In the spring of 5000 BCE, you are one of the first neolithic farmers of Europe, and you have to cooperate with the other players in this turn based game to survive. The turns are seasonal, and each Season has 5 Phases, and every player  completes a Phase before going to the next Phase. The Phases are (1) flip a Forecast and choose your single Action for the Season, (2) flip more Tiles as indicated by the Action and perform the Action, (3) your Domestic Animals fight it out with invading Pests and Predators, and (4) Advance your Fields and the Season. Then go to the next Season. The harsh snowbound winter will soon return, and you need to hunt, gather, fish, trap, and plant to stay alive. Keep your crops safe from hungry rats and insects that infest your fields and silos. Choose to either domesticate or hunt bigger animals to avoid starvation and survive the winter.

The best of each world: board games and teas come together to create a fun, meeting and strategy game. We have to use the flavors of our favorite tea. You have to form collections and score points!

El Equipo Azul and Heredia Infusiones y Especias present Blend!, the ideal game to sit around a table, share something delicious and play with the senses.

It is based on the draft or drafting, which is a mechanic in which players choose from a group of cards and then pass them on to the other players so they can choose from the rest.

The object of the game is to score the most points after three rounds. ¿How? forming tea collections. Whoever gets the highest score wins the game.

boardgame: Wits & Wagers: Las Vegas, Baby! – Expansión: Campeones del Mundo
description:
The World Cup euphoria cannot be contained, so we had to make this mini expansion to celebrate the Scaloneta cup. How much do you remember those beautiful days in Qatar?

Suggested pairing for this expansion: a good fernet.

boardgame: Secrets of the Lost Tomb: Epic Edition
description:
Secrets of the Lost Tomb: Epic Edition is a cooperative tile laying game of thrilling action-adventure and exploration now returning to the table with all new artwork and updates after 10 years!

Players become stalwart adventurers and members of the Eternal Order of Perseus working together to investigate ancient mysteries and danger on a quest to shield humanity from the supernatural powers of The Tomb: an ancient vault filled with primeval forces perpetually struggling to be set free upon the world. Powers that mankind should never behold…

The game includes the original 7 Fully Cooperative Scenarios and some all NEW ones, all updated and EPIC-ified for the 10 year anniversary, many unique Adventurer Characters to choose from with new art, over 50 unique and detailed room tiles with updated artwork, over two hundred tokens, and over three hundred cards, Secrets of the Lost Tomb is the most EPIC Ever-Evolving, Tomb-Crawling adventure every time you play.

—description from the publisher
family: Game: Secrets of the Lost Tomb

description:
In this expansion to DELVE: A Solo Map Drawing Game, you are given control of powerful Necromancers who can create undead units out of the new Bone resource earned from special rooms and new Undead themed Events.

New units for your hold including Vampires, Liches, Bone Golems, Undead Gunner, Paladins, Ghouls, and Vampire Hunters.
New rooms including the Monastery, Crypt, Stitcher, and Vampire's Nest.
13 New Discoveries including Ancient Burial Sites, Blood Pools, and Bone Wyverns.
6 New Monstrosity Traits
and 6 New Relic Powers

—description from the publisher
family: Game: Delve – A Solo Map Drawing Game

description:
In this 2-player "search and write" game, you are a soldier conducting reconnaissance to map out your enemy's base. Gather intel one square at a time and use logic to complete the map before your enemy does. Power up your jammer at the right times to slow them down!

Recon Mission's gameplay is a cross between Battleship and Minesweeper, with a defensive element of jamming signals. At the start of the game, players draw six different structures on their own base map. Then they take turns calling out squares on the enemy map. The other player indicates whether this square is confirmed as part of a structure, a number from 0-8 indicating how many surrounding squares are part of a structure, or "jammed" (meaning they don't want you to know).

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
Every dwarven culture contains the sharing of stories. Some are terrible warnings, some are bawdy tales, and some are romantic ballads – but all center around great dwarves of times past. It is every dwarf’s desire to become the subject of one of these stories that define their culture, to have their name become the stuff of legends remembered for centuries to come. For that reason, dwarves care deeply about great and daring exploits, grand battles – about names, and accomplishing things worthy of those names being honored.

—description from the designer
family: Game: Delve – A Solo Map Drawing Game

boardgame: QUEST: An RPG-styled hack for Delve
description:
QUEST is a map-drawing RPG, based on the incredible DELVE by Anna Blackwell, about exploring and re-discovering a ruined keep above and vast underground dungeon beneath it. You take control a party of adventurers exploring this abandoned keep, for fame, fortune, and a chance to discover the legendary Void Crystal.

QUEST is intended to focus on telling the story of a group of adventurers and the ruined keep they are exploring. Whenever the Party kicks open the next door, you’ll use a standard deck of cards to randomly determine what is found. Maybe ruined structures, and the treasures they hold, or lakes of lava, or nightmarish horrors more ancient than the keep. Once you find out what you’ve discovered, you'll draw it on your map as a record of your exploration, and write about it in an ongoing journal.

—description from the designer

In this expansion to RISE: A Solo Game of Spreading Evil you are given access to new Demonic Powers which come in the form of:


     New Units like the Haunted Dolls, Imps, Clown, and Lawyers



     New Rooms like the Circus, Dollhouse, and Infernal Court where you can sue Adventurers!



     Monarchs - Powerful royal demons that you must work hard to summon. Their special provide game changing abilities.
A promotional card representing two historical Lviv cafes, Kopalnya Kavy (1675) and Cafe Atlas (1871). Both cafes require two beans to be delivered in exchange for four points.

The first expansion for UMBRA, this 26 page digital zine features:


     New Station Building Mechanics - take a derelict station and revamp it with new station specific rooms. Conduct your research in the relative safety of space or appease Guests and earn some ♦



     Boarding Mechanics - control a tight knit group of units as you board alien spaceships in a party-based tactical exploration. Utilise disguises, hiding spaces, hack enemy security systems, loot rooms, and steal spaceships to expand your station.



     New Rooms - From bars and casinos to biohackers, escape pods, and museums, expand your colony and your station in new and interesting ways.



     Stores - Entice alien merchants to set up shop and benefit from their strange and wonderful goods. From scanners to skeletons, libraries to less legitimate businesses.
family: Game: Umbra – A Solo Game of Final Frontiers

description:
Venture into the cyberscape to protect yourself against a new kind of threat in this digital themed expansion to the solo map drawing game UMBRA.

With new Rooms, Units, and Events, this expansion provides loads of new challenges and rewards such as Shipboard A.Is and new Research as well as Artefacts and Terrors.
family: Game: Umbra – A Solo Game of Final Frontiers

description: Nuns with Nunchucks is a battle card game where you to try to take over the world with an army of hilarious combatants! Use your army to deal hit points to competitors while using trying to keep yourself alive. Make your friends and family beg for mercy as you unleash devastating combos using special powers.

This expansion adds new mechanics in the form of a new unit type, classes, and ranks. All Legion UNITS will begin at the lowest rank in the Legion and have a random class assigned to them. By completing fights with the Legion units you will collect experience points to increase their abilities and rank.
family: Game: Delve – A Solo Map Drawing Game

description:
The Bible has 66 books, and each book a theme that God wishes to share with his people.

Bible it is a fun family game for 2-5 players where you will explore and learn about the various books in the Bible as scholars who are competing with each other to score points through various tokens.

Exploring these books and finding the right ones to bind together in its biblical order of course is your number one priority. Earn points when you do this and sometimes bonuses too. Race to collect the most points. And that's how you win at Bible-it.

—description from the publisher

New Histories is a fan-created expansion for the trick taking card game Chronicle.

The expansion adds an additional 15 History cards to the base game.

“Physical reality is a distant legend. Now, humanity is stuck in a digital cage stitched together by chaos and imagination. That’s the way it’s always been. No bodies, only souls. The rules that shape Autumn Network were coded well before our memory. Nobody knows who made them or why, but everyone knows the program that may be strong enough to break them: an ancient, shattered relic – the Singularity. Fragments are already being gathered. Our fates depend on the one who is strong enough to assemble them all. We Hana Mori shamans? We believe it’s the key to getting our bodies back… everyone’s bodies back, and we’ll do anything and everything it takes to see our dream come true.” - Kodama, Canopy Mystic

Welcome to a vibrant, digital universe where humans have abandoned physical reality and fight for control of a legendary program called the Singularity. Singularity.exe is a deterministic card game that empowers endless creativity with absolutely no random elements. In collaboration with hundreds of testers across thousands of playtesting hours, Singularity has become an intuitive and elegant experience that is deeply engaging and enormously fun for a wide variety of players.

With 170+ unique cards and dozens of gameplay mechanics, Singularity has something for everyone. We have ensured every card is viable and packed with strategic potential.  Take complete control by crafting your action economy. You'll never experience dead draws, resource flood, or resource starvation. Randomness will never sabotage your strategy. You can be certain every decision and every accompanying consequence is your own. Your opponent is your enemy, not your own deck.


     Ready to play and easy to learn with pre-created squads in the core set, Singularity is a fun and perfectly balanced experience out of the box.
     Explore the content in Autumn Network as you find Fragments to launch the Singularity through our lightweight campaign system.
     Solo & Cooperative play is supported with the companion app launching alongside the game.


—description from the publisher

Players fight for battlefield control in this super fast card-placement game set in the dystopian sci-fi world of Falling Edge.  Compete using the core rules for super fast rounds or utilise the enhanced ruleset for strategic depth with faction based combat and abilities. Play 2-4 players competitive, team-based 2v2 (or even combine multiple games to play 5+ player tournaments).

Use characters and abilities from the different factions in Falling Edge:
The Chosen, powerful humans carrying the souls of ancient heroes that try to protect the weak.
The Cult, an underground organisation willing to sacrifice anything (or anyone) for the sake of power.
The Wanderers, nomad tribes accustomed to the harsh conditions outside of the few remaining cities.
AI, the robotic beings working together as one connected mysterious artificial intelligence.
Soldiers, the military forces of 'The Cooperation' that controls the remaining human cities and the life within.

—description from the designer

Word Garden is a competitive word-building card game for 1-4 players. You and your friends live in a neighborhood where nothing is more important than having the nicest garden on the block. Players build three gardens using stacks of clear cards, forming as many words as possible in their completed gardens. Play your cards right, and you'll earn the title of Master Gardener!

Play centers around two decks of double-sided acrylic cards, each containing a pattern of letter-covered plants. Players simultaneously choose one of four cards from their hand to plant in their gardens. The remaining cards are then passed left and a new card is drawn from the deck. This process is repeated for a total of 12 rounds, with each player forming three gardens of 4 cards each by stacking them on top of each other.

Each completed garden contains 16 plants that form a 4 x 4 letter grid. Points are scored from words formed within the grid as well as from personal and shared goals. The player who scores the most total points wins the game.

A Solo Mode is also included with three levels of AI difficulty. Play occurs similarly except that, rather than being passed, unused cards are assembled into gardens for the AI, whose goals are revealed over time. Score more points than the AI to win the game.

—description from the designer

The march of technology across BattleTech’s eras is relentless—but some war machines never die. This PDF-only series includes brand-new BattleMechs and OmniMechs, alongside Classic ’Mechs and combat vehicles from both the Inner Sphere and the Clans rebuilt with the latest technology to keep them competitive on modern battlefields. This series also includes in-universe development notes, battle histories, notable pilots, and record sheets for each unit.

—description from the publisher

Same as https://boardgamegeek.com/boardgameexpansion/379944/battletech-recognition-guide-ilclan-volume-31

Rogue’s Dare is a push-your-luck bluffing game. Players try to outbid each other on how much treasure they can get from the dragon’s dungeon. As they do, they place down cards with these treasures and traps that might alert and wake the dragon. The most daring rogue will uncover these cards to take the treasure while trying to avoid the traps other players might have planted or else wake the dragon and fail.

—description from the publisher

Players run a restaurant from welcoming the clients to adding the ingredients on the pizzas, while doing the accounting and service. The game only lasts a few minutes but it's total chaos.
Pizza Rush is a real time cooperative game published in France.

This pack's shop cards revolve around the Event cards. Events are shuffled into the main deck, when revealed their effect is activated and then they are scrapped.

This pack's shop cards revolve around the Upgrade mechanic. When you buy an Upgrade card from the shop it goes directly into play and stays there all game giving your robot a permanent new ability!

Until your opponents smash them that is...

42 Kickstarter Exclusive Cards and 13 Kickstarter Exclusive Game Tiles
4 Rules/Reference cards also included.

boardgame: Darkest Dungeon: The Board Game – Musketeer Hero
description: A new Hero joins the fray! Add The Musketeer to your roster of Heroes to aid you against the many challenges of the Darkest Dungeon. Use his skills to safely dispose of enemies from a distance and carve your path through the darkness!

boardgame: G.I. JOE Deck-Building Game: New Alliances Bonus Box #4
description: A promo pack for G.I. Joe Deck-Building Game's Transformers crossover expansion containing two new cards (Grimlock and Dinobot Rampage) and a dual-layered Ark board.

Zoltán Győri's new card game, Szeszélyes Vizeken ("On Whimsical Waters"), is a fast-paced bluffing card game that lasts for five rounds.
At the beginning of each round, shuffle the cards belonging to the current round thoroughly, then spread them close to each other in any arrangement face down in the center of the playing field.
During the game, players can choose between scouting (here they can bluff), sailing (here there can be failure or glory in the deck) and passing.

At the end of the round, any untaken cards are returned to the game box, and then the next deck is used in the next round. The game ends after the fifth round.
The players count the value of their glories (each is worth the number on it) and subtract the value of their failures from this (it is also true here that each card represents a failure equal to its value).
The player with the highest score wins the game. In the event of a tie, the player with fewer failures wins the game. If there is still a tie, the players share the victory.

One minute isn't the world, is it? Do you feel the same way even if you only have so much time to memorize every detail of a picture? Exciting challenges await!

The Memorace board game develops not only memory but also general knowledge and literacy in a fun way: this time you can marvel at natural phenomena. Get involved as soon as possible, learn playfully!

Along with the challenges, the game develops logical thinking, memory and attention - all in an interactive and fun way.

Gameplay:


     Draw a card and place it in front of you.
     Turn the clock over and try to remember as many details as possible while the sand is spreading - this is about 10 seconds.
     Roll the dice!
     If you rolled a 1, you must answer the thought-provoking puzzle on the front page. Look at the picture and count or guess correctly!
     If you did not roll a 1, turn the card over and answer the question on the back next to the rolled number. These will test your memory, but if you pay attention, you will definitely know the answer!
A promo pack for Transformers Deck-Building Game containing 2 new characters (Windblade & Ramjet), and two new main deck cards (Miner Megatron & Orion Pax).

2, 3 or 4 people can take part in the game, each paying 5 or 10 tokens into the till. With 2 players, one leads the spider, the other the 12 flies. If there are 3 players, one leads the spider, the other two each 6 flies. With 4 players, one leads the spider, the other three each 4 flies. If the flies are distributed among several players, they must be numbered.

One of the flies begins the game by throwing a die and moving  from a predetermined corner to the opposite corner on the weblines. When it reaches it, it gets 3 tokens from the spider. However, if the fly doesn't reach the opposite corner, the spider rolls the die and in turn moves. If the spider reaches the fly, it has caught the fly and receives 3 tokens from the player concerned. If the spider throws high, it can catch 2 to 3 flies in one turn. After each turn the spider is placed back in the middle of the web.
The flies that have stayed on the board always have the first move. Then a fly, which is not yet on the board, moves, which the spider always following.

The flies caught by the spider are taken off the board and remain in the spider's custody until released. This happens when a fly from the same player reaches the sanctuary. This is also taken off the board and can continue to move anew.
For each fly that escapes from the web, the player concerned writes down one point; For each fly caught, the spider gets one point. Whoever gets 50 points first wins the game.

—user summary

During the commemoration of the university Occult Laboratory, the president died.
It has vomit marks in the mouth of the cremains and bruises on the back of the head, and biting scars and blood marks on the chest.
The criminal is within the three remaining members!?
It became evident in a room investigation, president's past villains, three connotations,
And the mystery of the creepy relief that has been carved from the course of the floor of the room and a monstrous phenomenon that can be spoken.

Any participant starts the game, and then it continues in the clockwise direction. When it's your turn, you roll all three dice three times in a row. After each throw, you fix your result:

     For each die that has a value with a central point ("center of the flower"), you get points: one for one, two for three, four for five.
     For every two, four and six you get no points.
     If there are three even numbers, then the number of points scored by him in this round doubles. However, if he repeatedly throws three even numbers in this circle, then the points are not doubled. In addition, even threes are not included in the limit of throws.


Write down all the results in a notebook and add up the results of each player. The player who received the highest amount of points based on the results of four rounds is the winner.

—user summary

Players start with a small number of Galactic Credits, a Corporate Headquarters and a small facility.  Since space is a very large place, on your turn you roll dice to determine the area of space players will focus their attention this turn.  As the Active Player you have numerous options including activating factories, building new factories, hiring employees, or even affect the conditions for victory.  When you’re done, other players in clockwise order may activate their factories that fall within the area of focus you determined to produce raw materials, convert raw materials into finished goods, or sell finished goods on the market.

Money is needed throughout the game, but being the best at growing your corporation in the right places and at the right time will win the game.  Three scoring rounds occur twice during the game and once at the end.  The victory conditions change after each scoring (and possibly also by players) and are determined by a Victory Conditions card.  The player with the most victory points at the end is the winner.

Escaping from prison, Carnage partnered with Shriek and the couple started a twisted sort of “family”, bringing in Doppelganger and Demogoblin under Carnage’s symbiotic “wings”. Joined by other dark Villains like Morbius, the living vampire, these New Sinister Six pose a unified threat that will test the heroes’ resolve to the limit. Carnage poses a whole new kind of challenge, though. Spreading his infection around, the symbiote is hellbent on bringing Maximum Carnage to the world!

This expansion brings a whole new set of sinister Villains for the Heroes to face. Whether tackled on their own, or as the united New Sinister Six, each of these Villains poses a unique threat. But to bring Maximum Carnage to any of your games, this set also includes the Carnage Challenge, where Dark Carnage prowls around the game area infecting people and raising the stakes of the game. Take him out quickly, or you may find yourself facing Dark Carnage as a full-fledged Villain!

—description from the publisher

Buying game: To be the fastest to finish your shopping, you'll need a little luck and a smart approach to managing money. A fun introduction to buying games, working with numbers and learning to give change.

The game is simple - to be the winner you must 'out-score' and 'out-word' your opponent. 
Take turns to place a tile onto the board and begin building words to add to your score.
The longer the word is the bigger your score gets. 
Guaranteed endless fun for all the family; take on this challenge and discover the unlimited potential of HexaGram!
It's time to go head to head against family and friends in this classic game of strategy and vocabulary, designed to discover words on a 'whole new level'...

—description from the designer

Canada now has its very own version of Family Feud.
Complete with hundreds of Survey questions, and a Fast Money Bonus Round, competing with family and friends has never been so much fun.

Jeu de Cavagnole is a game of Genoese origin, notably played in the eighteenth century in France, where it was introduced in the 1730's. Its name comes from the Italian words cavagnolo or cavagnola "small basket". The game was mostly played by women of the aristocracy.

Jeu de Cavagnole is made up of a variable number of square cards, each card with five numbers, four in the corners and a fifth in the center. Each part of the game has an illustration (painted or engraved), usually of small popular subjects.

The game is similar to a lottery where you bet on the numbers that will come out, a bit like roulette (a game of chance). In turn, one of the players "holds the bank", that is to say, extracts from a bag a numbered ticket that decides the gain or loss of the players. You bet by putting token coins on the numbers. You can play a whole card, two numbers in a row or a full number.

boardgame: World of Warcraft Trading Card Game: Naxxramas Raid Deck
description:
An asymmetrical two-sided card game where one player takes on the role of the raid bosses and their minions, and is opposed by one or more other players who take on the role of the raiding heroes.

The expansions contains the deck and special rule cards for the Raid player. The raiding heroes will need 60-card decks (not included) to defeat them.

Who wouldn’t want to head to Rio de Janeiro for Carnivale? The bright lights. The great food. The parades. The outfits. However, all is not well in the streets. Instead of floats and feathers, they’re filled with the walking dead, ready to add to the shambling hordes. This vacation just turned into a fight for life.

Zombicide: Rio Z Janeiro is a new campaign expansion for Zombicide 2nd edition. The setting is the busy streets of Rio de Janeiro where the Survivors must make it out of town as quickly as they can. However, along the way, they learn of a potential cure for the plague. Can they get to it in time, or must they head out to sea? This set includes an all-new narrative campaign to take players through a harrowing story of survival.

—description from the publisher

A fast and brutal skirmish system, designed around quick and engaging gameplay.

Brethren is designed to be Fast, Fun and Ferocious.

The rules have been designed in a way to allow wargaming on a tight schedule. Like many others I struggle to get opponents and games in while juggling everything else in life.

Through playtesting the True Skirmish Mode (smallest iteration) can be played within half an hour and the Big Army Mode lasts the typical amount of time as other major games.

—description from the publisher

There is a free downloadable PDF of the Quick Start Guide on the Rules page of the website.
